templates.name: Headline
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product colors, typography style, and brand tone precisely. Create: a static ad with a [BACKGROUND] background. Top third: large bold sans-serif headline reading "[YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words]". Below in smaller text: "[YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence]". Bottom half: [YOUR PRODUCT] on the surface with [DETAILS]. Shot at 50mm f/2.8 from slightly above. [BRAND] logo bottom right. Clean, authoritative. 4:5 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Offer/Promotion
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact brand colors and typography style. Create: a promotional ad with a split background. Top 60% is [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] and bottom 40% is [CONTRAST COLOR like warm cream]. [YOUR PRODUCT] sits centered where colors meet, soft studio lighting. Upper area: large [CONTRAST TEXT] sans-serif reading "[YOUR OFFER like YOUR FIRST MONTH FREE]". Below: "[OFFER DETAILS]". Lower section: medium [BRAND COLOR] text with 2 value adds in legible font size.

templates.name: Testimonials
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Create: a testimonial ad set in [SETTING like bright bathroom / kitchen] with warm natural light. [YOUR PRODUCT] on [SURFACE], slightly out of focus. Overlaid: large bold white sans-serif "[SHORT HEADLINE]". Below: "[FULL QUOTE 2-3 sentences]. [NAME], [CREDENTIAL leave empty if there is none]." Five filled yellow stars. Shot on 35mm f/2.0. 9:16 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Features/Benefits Point-Out
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Create: an educational diagram-style ad on white background. Top: bold [BRAND COLOR] text "[HEADER like What Makes [PRODUCT] Different]". Below: [YOUR PRODUCT] centered, even studio lighting. Four features: "[BENEFIT 1-4]". Each has a small [BRAND COLOR] circle. Scientific diagram redesigned by a luxury agency. 4:5 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Bullet-Points
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Create: a benefit-list ad, split composition on [BACKGROUND] background. Left 40%: [YOUR PRODUCT] on [SURFACE], shot at 85mm f/2.8. Right 60%: vertical stack of three lines with filled [BRAND COLOR] circles: "[BENEFIT 1-3]". Clean sans-serif, generous spacing. Plain light Green #2E9345 CTA at bottom right with text [reason to buy in 3-4 words in bold]. 4:5 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Social Proof
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Create: a social proof ad on [BACKGROUND like warm cream]. Top: "[HEADLINE like Join 1,000,000+ Members]" in bold [BRAND COLOR]. Five filled stars with "Rated [X] out of 5". Center: [YOUR PRODUCT] at 50mm f/4. Below: frosted white card with five-star rating, "[REVIEW TITLE]", "[2-3 SENTENCE REVIEW]", "[ATTRIBUTION]" in italic. 4:5 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Us vs Them
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Create: a side-by-side divided vertically. Left: muted gray-blue background. Right: [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR]. Center top: white circle with "VS". Left header: "[Competitor category]" + generic competitor product + list with X marks: "[WEAKNESS 1-3]". Right header: [YOUR PRODUCT] + list with checkmarks: "[STRENGTH 1-3]". 4:5 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Before & After (UGC Native)
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference for product color ONLY. This should look like a real person's post. Create: TikTok before-and-after. LEFT: grainy iPhone mirror selfie, [PERSON] in dimly lit bathroom, [BEFORE STATE], harsh lighting. White handwritten text: "[BEFORE DATE]". RIGHT: same person, same bathroom, bright natural light, [AFTER STATE], [PRODUCT] visible on counter. White text: "[AFTER DATE]". Top center: "[TIMEFRAME] on [BRAND]" with emoji. Should look stitched in CapCut. 9:16 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Negative Marketing (Bait & Switch)
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Create: Background is close-up of [PRODUCT], slightly blurred. Center: white rounded-rectangle review card (Amazon-style). Gray user icon, "[NAME]", one gold star + four gray, orange "Verified Purchase" badge, bold text: "[BAIT that sounds negative but is positive]". Bottom: bold white sans-serif "[PUNCHLINE like THE REVIEWS ARE IN.]". [BRAND] logo bottom right. 4:5 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Press/Editorial
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Create: a press ad on off-white linen background. Top: "As Featured In" in small [BRAND COLOR] uppercase wide-tracked text. Below: five grayscale publication logos. Center: italic serif pull-quote in [BRAND COLOR]: "[PRESS QUOTE]" with attribution. Lower third: [PRODUCT] at 85mm f/2.8, soft side light. [BRAND] logo bottom left. Generous white space. Full-page Vogue energy. 4:5 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Pull-Quote Review Card
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product colors and brand tone precisely. Create: a review-driven ad with a solid [BRAND COLOR with hex — a soft, muted tone works best] color block background filling the entire image. Top half: large bold italic larken serif text in white with curly quotation marks reading "[PULL-QUOTE — the most emotional 4-8 word phrase from the review, e.g., "I finally found something that works!"]". Directly below the quote: five medium filled gold/yellow star icons in a horizontal row. Bottom left, overlapping the color background: a white rounded-corner review card with subtle shadow, containing: a small gray circular default avatar icon, beside it "[FIRST NAME + LAST INITIAL]" in bold dark sans-serif with a small [FLAG EMOJI matching target market — e.g., 🇺🇸], below the name a blue checkmark icon with "[VERIFIED REVIEWER / VERIFIED BUYER]" in small blue text. Below the reviewer info: the review body text in medium-weight dark sans-serif, 4-6 lines of authentic-sounding customer voice that trails off mid-sentence, ending with "...Read more" in bold [BRAND COLOR] text — the truncation is intentional to create curiosity. Below the review text: "Was this review helpful?" in small gray text with a thumbs-up icon and "[HELPFULNESS COUNT — e.g., 150 / 2.4K]" beside it. Bottom right, overlapping both the card and the color background: [YOUR PRODUCT — full packaging description] angled slightly toward the viewer, sitting on the color block surface with a subtle shadow beneath. No brand logo needed if the product packaging already shows it — the review card IS the social proof. 1:1 or 4:5 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Lifestyle Action + Product Colorway Array
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design, colors, and visual tone precisely. Create: a static ad with a [LIFESTYLE PHOTO DESCRIPTION like man mid-golf-swing in tropical patterned polo and khaki pants] occupying the left two-thirds of the frame, shot outdoors in [SETTING like golf course with palm trees], bright natural daylight. [BRAND] logo top center in bold. Below logo: large bold sans-serif quote text reading "[ENDORSEMENT HEADLINE like THE GREATEST PANTS IN GOLF]" in [TEXT COLOR like white or black]. Bottom right foreground: three [PRODUCT VARIANTS like folded pairs of shorts/pants] fanned in an overlapping arrangement showing [COLOR 1], [COLOR 2], and [COLOR 3]. Products are crisp and studio-lit against the lifestyle background. Shot on 50mm f/2.0, lifestyle background slightly softer than foreground product. [MOOD like confident, athletic, aspirational but accessible]. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Stat Surround / Callout Radial (Product Hero)
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design, colors, and typography style precisely. Create: a static ad on a white-to-[LIGHT GRADIENT COLOR like warm golden beige] gradient background, gradient fading from top to bottom. Top: large bold [TEXT COLOR like dark brown] sans-serif headline reading "[HEADLINE like So tasty you'll forget it's actually healthy.]" Center: [YOUR PRODUCT like single stand-up pouch] on white background, soft studio lighting. Floating near the product: a small circular badge reading "[PRICE POINT like AS LOW AS $2.63 PER MEAL!]" in [BADGE COLOR]. Flanking the product on both sides: four stat callouts with curved arrows pointing toward the product. Left side top: "[STAT 1 like 20g]" in oversized bold text with "[LABEL like PROTEIN]" below. Left side bottom: "[STAT 2 like 280]" with "[LABEL like CALORIES]". Right side top: "[STAT 3 like 900k+]" with "[LABEL like HAPPY CUSTOMERS]". Right side bottom: "[STAT 4 like 30k+]" with "[LABEL like 5-STAR REVIEWS]" and five filled gold stars beneath. Arrows are simple hand-drawn-style curved lines in [ARROW COLOR like black]. Bottom foreground: [FLAVOR PROPS like scattered chocolate chip cookie dough balls and chocolate chips] adding appetite appeal. No brand logo. Clean, informational, appetizing. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Bundle Showcase + Benefit Bar
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design, colors, and typography style precisely. Create: a static ad on a [BACKGROUND like soft pink-to-hot-pink gradient] background. Top: oversized bold white all-caps sans-serif headline reading "[HEADLINE like 24/7 PEAK FEMALE PERFORMANCE]". Below headline: a horizontal [ACCENT COLOR like purple/violet] banner bar divided into [NUMBER like five] equal segments separated by thin vertical lines, each containing a two-word benefit label in white text: "[BENEFIT 1 like Morning Energy]", "[BENEFIT 2 like Focus Amplifier]", "[BENEFIT 3 like Deep Sleep]", "[BENEFIT 4 like Ultimate Beauty]", "[BENEFIT 5 like Metabolism Booster]". Center-to-bottom: an open [PACKAGING like branded gift box] photographed at a slight overhead angle showing [NUMBER like three] [PRODUCTS like supplement jars] nestled inside, each a different [COLOR-CODED VARIANT]. In the lower foreground: a [LIFESTYLE PROP like woman's hand holding a pastel dumbbell] entering the frame from bottom. [BRAND] logo bottom left corner. Bright studio lighting, saturated color, energetic and empowering. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Social Comment Screenshot + Product
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design and colors precisely. Create: a static ad on a clean white background. Top: oversized bold black sans-serif headline reading "[HOOK HEADLINE like IF YOU'RE GOING THROUGH PERI..]" with [EMOJI like 😅] at the end. Center: a social media comment card with light gray rounded-rectangle background containing: a small circular profile avatar (top left), bold name "[REVIEWER NAME like Elaine McLean]", and a multi-sentence review in regular-weight sans-serif: "[FULL REVIEW TEXT, 3-4 sentences, conversational and emotional]". Small gray timestamp "[TIMESTAMP like 2d]" below the comment. Bottom center: [YOUR PRODUCT like product box and bar/bottle] photographed at a slight angle on white, soft studio lighting. No brand logo. No stars. The rawness is the point — this should look like someone screenshotted a real comment and dropped the product photo below it. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Curiosity Gap / Hook Quote Testimonial
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design, colors, and typography style precisely. Create: a static ad on a clean white background. Top center: large [ACCENT COLOR like periwinkle blue] opening quotation marks. Below: mixed-weight headline in black — the first line in italic serif or semi-bold reading "[SETUP LINE like I've been]", the next two lines in enormous heavy-weight bold all-caps sans-serif reading "[BAIT PHRASE like FAKING IT / WITH MY HUSBAND]", followed by a smaller sentence-case line reading "[REVEAL like since perimenopause — with [BRAND] I don't have to]". Closing quotation marks and "[ATTRIBUTION like - Erin D.]" in regular weight. Left side bottom third: [YOUR PRODUCT like supplement bottle] at a slight angle with [PRODUCT DETAILS like capsules scattered nearby]. To the left of the product: a [TRUST BADGE like circular seal reading "Happiness 60 DAY Guaranteed"]. Right side bottom third: [NUMBER like five] filled [ACCENT COLOR] stars and bold text reading "[REVIEW COUNT like 3,600+] 5-Star Reviews" with a [BRAND ICON]. Bottom edge: small disclaimer text "[DISCLAIMER like Results may vary based on individual. No results guaranteed.]" 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Verified Review Card
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design, colors, and typography style precisely. Create: a static ad on a solid [BRAND COLOR like periwinkle/lavender blue] background. Top: large bold white serif or semi-bold sans-serif pull-quote reading "[HEADLINE QUOTE like "I finally found something that works!"]" in quotation marks. Below the quote: five filled gold stars, large. Center-left: a white rounded-rectangle review card with subtle shadow containing: gray circular avatar icon, bold name "[REVIEWER NAME like Dawn K.]" with [FLAG EMOJI like 🇺🇸], blue checkmark and "[VERIFIED BADGE TEXT like Verified Reviewer]" in [BRAND COLOR] text, then 3-4 sentences of review body text in regular weight dark text. At the bottom of the card: a blue "[READ MORE like ...Read more]" link and "[HELPFULNESS like Was this review helpful? 👍 150]". Right side, overlapping the card edge: [YOUR PRODUCT like cream jar with lid] photographed at a slight angle, soft studio lighting, casting a gentle shadow on the background. No brand logo. The review UI is the trust mechanic. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Stat Surround / Callout Radial (Lifestyle Flatlay)
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design, colors, and typography style precisely. Create: a static ad on a white background with a lifestyle flatlay arrangement. Top: bold [ACCENT COLOR like purple] filled banner bar spanning full width, white all-caps sans-serif reading "[HEADLINE like INCREDIBLY TASTY BREAKFAST IN 30 SECONDS]". Center: a [PERSON DETAIL like woman's hand] holding [YOUR PRODUCT like branded shaker cup] in mid-frame. Scattered around the edges: [FLATLAY PROPS like product sachets, pancakes on plates, blueberries, muffins, fruit] arranged organically to fill corners and edges, slightly out of focus. Four stat callouts with curved [ACCENT COLOR] arrows pointing toward the held product: "[STAT 1 like 20g] / [LABEL like PROTEIN]", "[STAT 2 like 900K] / [LABEL like HAPPY CUSTOMERS]", "[STAT 3 like 20+] / [LABEL like FLAVORS]", "[STAT 4 like 30K] / [LABEL like 5 STAR REVIEWS]" with five small gold stars. Stats in bold black, labels in all-caps regular weight. Bright, flat studio lighting. Energetic, appetizing, information-dense but scannable. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Highlighted / Annotated Testimonial
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design, colors, and typography style precisely. Create: a static ad on a clean white background. Top left: circular customer headshot photo of [PERSON DESCRIPTION like smiling woman, mid-60s, silver wavy hair, wearing blue top]. To the right of the photo: bold name "[REVIEWER NAME like Veronica B.]" with a [VERIFIED ICON like blue checkmark]. Below: a long-form customer quote in large regular-weight black sans-serif type spanning most of the frame: "[FULL QUOTE, 3-5 sentences]". Key phrases within the quote are highlighted with [HIGHLIGHT COLOR like bright lime green / neon yellow] rectangular background fills behind the text: "[HIGHLIGHTED PHRASE 1 like thyroid removed]", "[HIGHLIGHTED PHRASE 2 like This is the best product I have found.]" Bottom right: [YOUR PRODUCT like supplement jar] at a slight angle, partially cropped at the bottom edge. To the left of the product: a circular [TRUST BADGE like "100% MONEY BACK / 90 DAYS / 100% GUARANTEE"] seal in [BADGE COLOR like lime green with dark text]. [BRAND] logo bottom left corner, small. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Advertorial / Editorial Content Card
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference for tone ONLY. Do NOT use polished ad layouts. This should look like organic editorial content. Create: a full-bleed moody portrait photo of [PERSON DESCRIPTION like young man in dark textured sweater holding an electric guitar], warm amber-toned lighting, shot on 50mm f/1.8, shallow depth of field, cinematic color grade with warm highlights and cool shadows. Lower 45% of the frame is a text overlay zone: a prominent white rounded-rectangle pill label reading "[CATEGORY TAG like HOT TOPIC]" in centered uppercase sans-serif, sized to span roughly one-third of the frame width. Below: very large, dominant, bold all-caps condensed sans-serif headline filling the width of the frame in white text with key words in [HIGHLIGHT COLOR]: "[HEADLINE like [BRAND] IS BLOWING UP ON TIKTOK — HERE'S WHY EVERYONE'S USING IT TO [ACTION]]". The headline should be oversized — at least 35% of the total frame height. Bottom center: "[@HANDLE like @waveform.watch]" in small white text. No product shot, no CTA button, no stars. This should read like a music blog or culture account post, not a paid ad. 4:5 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Bold Statement / Reaction Headline
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design, colors, and visual tone precisely. Create: a static ad on a vibrant [GRADIENT like coral-pink to golden-yellow] gradient background, flowing diagonally from upper left to lower right. Upper left: oversized playful [FONT STYLE like rounded retro serif / Cooper Black style] white headline reading "[BOLD STATEMENT like This oil is so Damm Luxurious]" — text should feel loose, fun, and expressive, not rigid or corporate. Right side: [PERSON DETAIL like a hand reaching down from upper right] grabbing from [YOUR PRODUCT like the signature bright yellow popper bowl overflowing with fluffy popcorn]. Product sits center-right, slightly below midline. Bottom left: [BRAND] logo in [LOGO COLOR like black] with "[PRODUCT DESCRIPTOR like Flavor Wrapped Popcorn Kernels]" in smaller text below. No stats, no reviews, no badges. The gradient and the headline do all the work. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Ingredient Story / "Your Skin On"
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design, colors, and packaging precisely. Create: an ingredient-visualization ad. Full background is a photorealistic close-up of the hero ingredient — [HERO INGREDIENT SCENE like fresh saffron threads scattered on a dark wet stone surface, with a few drops of golden oil catching soft light]. Shot at 50mm f/2.8, shallow depth of field, warm golden-hour lighting. Top third: large bold white sans-serif headline reading "[HEADLINE like Your skin on Saffron + 8 rare Ayurvedic actives]" with one key phrase in bold italic for emphasis. [YOUR PRODUCT] — bottle or dropper unit placed bottom-right, angled 15° as if casually set into the scene. Bottom: semi-transparent white bar spanning full width with three stat columns separated by thin vertical lines: "[STAT 1 like 27 RARE HERBS]" | "[STAT 2 like VISIBLY BRIGHTER IN 14 DAYS]" | "[STAT 3 like 500 YEARS OF AYURVEDA]". Very bottom edge: smaller bold sans-serif "[CLEAN BEAUTY CLAIM like NO PARABENS · NO SULPHATES · DERMATOLOGIST TESTED]". Ingredient is the hero — product is the payoff. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Long-Form Manifesto / Letter Ad
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact brand typography style and tone. Create: a copy-dominant manifesto ad on a clean white background. No background imagery — text is the entire creative. Top: oversized bold black serif or sans-serif headline reading "[PROVOCATIVE HEADLINE like They're not cheap.]" spanning the top 15%. Below: left-aligned body copy in smaller regular-weight black text, structured as short punchy sentences and line breaks (NOT paragraphs), building a persuasive argument about [CORE BRAND TENSION like why the price is justified]. The copy should flow through: acknowledging the objection, listing what you'd lose if they cut corners, reframing as a positive, closing with a confident brand statement. Approximately [12-18 LINES] of copy. Bottom 20%: [YOUR PRODUCT] centered or slightly right, product-only on white, clean studio shot angle. No icons, no badges, no CTA button. The writing IS the ad. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Product + Comment Callout (Faux Social Proof)
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design and packaging precisely. Create: a social proof ad. Top 55%: [YOUR PRODUCT] centered on a clean white background, studio-lit, shot at 85mm f/2.8 with soft shadow. Product cap/lid slightly open or [DETAIL showing use]. A few [LOOSE UNITS like gummies / capsules] spilling casually at the base. Bottom 45%: a realistic Facebook-style comment card. Left: small circular profile photo of [PERSON DESCRIPTION like a man in his 30s, friendly smile, casual]. Bold name "[FIRST NAME + LAST INITIAL like Alan R.]" above the comment. Comment text in regular weight: "[TESTIMONIAL 2-3 sentences touching on a specific problem and the product being a game-changer]". Below comment: "[TIMEFRAME like 4w]" · Like · Reply in gray. Bottom right of comment: Facebook-style reaction emojis (thumbs up + heart) with "[COUNT like 33]". Should look like an organic screenshot, not designed. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Us vs. Them Color Split
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design and colors precisely. Create: a side-by-side comparison ad divided vertically into two equal halves. Left half: [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR like vibrant teal] background. [YOUR PRODUCT] photographed with dynamic energy — [ACTION DETAIL like chocolate dripping / liquid pouring] to convey indulgence. Brand logo in bold white upper-left. Below product: vertical stack of 4 benefits, each with a green circle checkmark emoji: "[STRENGTH 1-4 like ≤2G SUGAR / ALL NATURAL INGREDIENTS / ≥6G FIBRE / 12G PROTEIN]" in bold white uppercase. Right half: [CONTRAST COLOR like pale cream/beige] background. Generic unbranded competitor product [DESCRIPTION like crumpled foil-wrapped chocolate bar]. Header: "[COMPETITOR CATEGORY like Other chocolate bars]" in dark text. Below: vertical stack of 4 weaknesses, each with a red circle X emoji: "[WEAKNESS 1-4 like 29G SUGAR / FULL OF FRUCTOSE CORN SYRUP / 1G FIBRE / 2G PROTEIN]" in bold dark uppercase. Center divider: a comic-style "VS" burst graphic in [ACCENT COLOR like coral/red]. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Stat Callout (Data-Driven Lifestyle)
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact brand colors and typography. Create: a statistic-led ad. Top 50%: lifestyle product photography — [SCENE like a woman's hands holding the product pad / person using the product in context] on a [MOOD like warm, skin-toned, soft-focus] background. Product packaging visible in frame. Middle: brand logo centered with thin horizontal rules on either side as a visual divider. Bottom 50%: dark gradient overlay (fading from transparent to [DARK COLOR like deep brown/black]). Large bold uppercase sans-serif text: "[STAT-DRIVEN HEADLINE with specific percentages like AFTER SWITCHING TO [BRAND], [X]% OF USERS [RESULT], WHILE [Y]% [SECOND RESULT]]." Key result phrases highlighted in [ACCENT COLOR like soft pink / brand secondary color]. The statistic IS the headline — no separate subhead needed. 4:5 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Benefit Checklist Showcase (Split Product + Info)
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design and brand colors precisely. Create: an information-dense benefit ad, split composition. Left 45%: overhead product shot — [PRODUCT DISPLAY DESCRIPTION like a white bowl filled with fresh dog food divided into labeled sections by thin white lines, each section labeled in curved white text: "[VARIETY 1-4 like CHICKEN & YAMS / BEEF N' RICE / SALMON N' RICE / TURKEY & YAMS]"]. Shot on 50mm f/4, clean white surface. Right 55%: white background. Top: [STAR RATING like five gold stars] with "[REVIEW COUNT like 10,000+ REVIEWS]" in [BRAND COLOR]. Brand logo. Below: [BRAND COLOR] serif or sans-serif headline: "[HEADLINE like Made for the pickiest dogs]". Then 3 checkmark benefit rows, each with a filled [BRAND COLOR] circle checkmark + bold text: "[BENEFIT 1-3 like Head turning aroma / No additives, flavors, or preservatives / Ready to serve from the pouch]". Bottom right: large rounded [ACCENT COLOR] CTA button reading "[CTA like SHOP NOW]". 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Feature Arrow Callout / Product Annotation
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact brand colors and typography style. Create: a product annotation ad on a [BACKGROUND like warm cream/light yellow textured] background. Top: italic serif headline "[BENEFIT STATEMENT like Barista grade coffee. Instant. Affordable.]" in [BRAND COLOR like dark navy]. Below in massive bold sans-serif: "[VALUE PROP like ALL IN ONE]". Center: [PERSON'S HAND] holding [YOUR PRODUCT] at a natural angle. Four curved arrows in [BRAND COLOR] pointing from the product outward to four benefit callout labels arranged around it in bold [BRAND COLOR] text: "[CALLOUT 1-4 like NO sugar or calories / Multiple Flavors / Iced, cold or hot / Smooth and delicious]". Arrows should feel hand-drawn or editorial, not rigid. Bottom: full-width [CONTRAST COLOR like deep navy] banner with [PROMO TEXT like Free Shipping + FREE GIFTS] in bold [ACCENT COLOR like gold/white] with optional emoji accents. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: UGC + Viral Post Overlay
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference for product color ONLY. Do NOT use ad layouts or polish. This should look completely native and organic. Create: a casual selfie of [PERSON like a man in mid-20s, beanie, crewneck sweatshirt] doing something mundane [ACTION like brushing teeth, making coffee, cooking]. iPhone front camera, slightly grainy, bathroom/kitchen lighting, no professional setup. Overlaid in the center of the frame: a realistic screenshot of a [PLATFORM like Reddit / Twitter / X] post. [POST DETAILS like subreddit name, username, timestamp, upvote count]. Post title in bold: "[PROVOCATIVE OPINION HEADLINE related to the product's problem/benefit space]". Post body in regular text: "[2-3 sentences expanding on the opinion]". The post should feel like the person is reacting to it or sharing it — NOT selling a product. No product visible. No brand logo. No CTA. The hook is the opinion. 9:16 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Hero Statement + Icon Benefit Bar
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact brand colors, packaging, and typography. Create: a bold statement ad. Top 15%: white banner overlay with bold [BRAND COLOR like dark purple] sentence case sans-serif headline: "[2-3 WORD POWER STATEMENT like APPETITE KILLER.]" with a period for punch. Middle 55%: lifestyle product photo — [SCENE like woman's hand holding a capsule above an open supplement jar on a clean surface, soft natural light]. Product label and branding clearly visible. Bottom 25%: [SOFT BRAND COLOR like lavender/light purple] background. Three evenly spaced icon-and-text benefit columns: [ICON 1 + LABEL like (crossed-out burger icon) CURB APPETITE] | [ICON 2 + LABEL like (lightning bolt icon) BURN CALORIES] | [ICON 3 + LABEL like (heart + body icon) LOSE WEIGHT]. Icons are simple line-drawn in [BRAND COLOR] circles. Very bottom edge: scrolling ticker bar in [DARK BRAND COLOR] with repeating text: "[SOCIAL PROOF like OVER 300K+ LIVES CHANGED]". 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Comparison Grid / Table
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product packaging precisely. Create: a structured comparison grid ad on white background. Top row divided 50/50: Left: [YOUR PRODUCT] packaging photographed clean on white with [DETAIL like chips spilling out]. Right: [COMPETITOR PRODUCT] packaging on white. Below: three horizontal rows spanning full width, each divided 50/50 by a thin gray vertical line and separated by thin gray horizontal lines. Each row compares one attribute: Row 1: "[YOUR ADVANTAGE like Uses beef tallow.]" vs "[COMPETITOR WEAKNESS like Uses seed oils.]". Row 2: "[YOUR ADVANTAGE like Organic corn.]" vs "[COMPETITOR WEAKNESS like Pesticide corn.]". Row 3: "[YOUR ADVANTAGE like Tastes amazing.]" vs "[COMPETITOR WEAKNESS like Doesn't even taste good.]" All text in bold dark gray serif, centered in each cell. No icons, no colors, no checkmarks — the copy contrast does the work. Should feel like a meme-format comparison that would go viral on X or Reddit. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: UGC Story Callout / Text Bubble Explainer
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference for product color and packaging ONLY. Do NOT use ad layouts or polish. This must look like a real person's Instagram Story. Create: a casual iPhone photo of [PERSON DESCRIPTION like a woman's hand with clean natural nails] holding [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] at a slight angle over [SURFACE/SETTING like a clean white desk with lifestyle props]. Natural overhead daylight, slightly warm, iPhone 15 quality. Scattered casually across the frame: 5 small Instagram Story text sticker bubbles — each with a solid highlighted background color for readability. Every bubble is short: maximum 1–2 lines of text, 4–8 words each. Varied highlight colors across bubbles. Bubble 1: "[PRODUCT TOPIC]" — add a matching wellness or nature emoji after the words. 2–3 words max, large bold font. Bubble 2: "[EDUCATIONAL HOOK — one short surprising fact, max 7 words]". Bubble 3: "[WHY THIS PRODUCT — one punchy differentiator, excited tone, max 8 words]". Bubble 4: "[PERSONAL RESULT — one first-person result line with emoji, max 7 words]". Bubble 5: "[BRAND ENDORSEMENT — one short approval line, max 6 words]". Bubbles feel hand-placed at natural angles, not aligned or designed. No full sentences — treat each bubble like a keyword tag or quick caption. 9:16 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Faux Press / News Article Screenshot
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Create: a static ad designed to look like a real online news article screenshot. Top 25%: white background with a realistic major publication masthead/logo in large bold black serif text [PUBLICATION STYLE like "Daily Mail" or "TODAY" or "INSIDER"]. Below: thin gray horizontal rule. Small gray text "Latest Headlines" left-aligned. Then: bold black serif headline spanning full width: "[HEADLINE like 'It's my holy grail product': The $[PRICE] [PRODUCT CATEGORY] with over [NUMBER] five-star reviews]". Bottom 60%: two side-by-side casual UGC-style photos of [PEOPLE like two different young women, one brunette, one blonde] each holding [YOUR PRODUCT] in a casual selfie pose — one taken in natural daylight, one in warm indoor evening light. Photos should look like real customer submissions, not studio shots. No brand logo. No CTA. Should look like an organic article screenshot someone would share to their story. 4:5 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Faux iPhone Notes / App Screenshot
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design and packaging precisely. Create: a static ad disguised as an iPhone Notes app screenshot. Top: realistic iOS status bar (time "[TIME like 10:45]", signal bars, wifi icon, battery icon). Below: iOS Notes navigation — blue "< All iCloud" back arrow left, share icon and three-dot menu icon right. Below nav: small gray timestamp text "[DATE like 13 July 2023 10:44]". Main content area on white background: bold black serif headline "[HEADLINE like In Just [DOSAGE] A Day]". Below: [3 BENEFIT ROWS], each with a [BRAND COLOR] filled circle checkmark + [EMOJI] + bold black text using food-equivalency format: "[BENEFIT 1 like More Vitamin D than 800 mushrooms]" / "[BENEFIT 2 like More Folate than 4 cups of spinach]" / "[BENEFIT 3 like More Vitamin B1 than 7 cups of broccoli]". Right side, overlapping the benefit text slightly: [YOUR PRODUCT] at a slight angle with [DETAILS like a few gummies/capsules spilling out at the base]. Product should feel casually placed into the note layout, breaking the frame slightly. Clean white background throughout. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Hero Product Showcase + Stat Bar
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design, wrapper, and brand colors precisely. Create: a product showcase ad on a [BACKGROUND COLOR like warm sand/beige/cream] background. Top: large bold [BRAND COLOR like chocolate brown] uppercase sans-serif headline: "[SUPERLATIVE CLAIM like THE WORLD'S HEALTHIEST CHOCOLATE]". Below headline: white rounded-rectangle CTA button with [BRAND COLOR] uppercase text "[CTA like EXPLORE NOW]". Center: [YOUR PRODUCT] in full packaging, angled slightly, hero-lit with soft studio lighting. Surrounding the product: [SCATTERED ELEMENTS like broken chocolate pieces, cocoa powder dust, crumbs, ingredient pieces] arranged in an exploded/radial pattern creating visual energy and texture on the background surface. Bottom: a white or light rounded-pill stat bar spanning the width with three metrics separated by thin vertical lines: "[STAT 1 like 12G OF PROTEIN]" | "[STAT 2 like ≤2G OF SUGAR]" | "[STAT 3 like ≤3G OF NET CARBS]" in bold [BRAND COLOR] text. Numbers should be large and dominant, labels smaller below. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Whiteboard Before / After + Product Hold
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference for product packaging ONLY. Do NOT use ad layouts or polish. This should look like a real person's photo. Create: a bright lifestyle photo set in [SETTING like a bright modern kitchen]. In the background: a small tabletop dry-erase whiteboard or flip-chart propped up on [SURFACE like a marble countertop]. On the whiteboard: two simple hand-drawn black marker line illustrations side by side — left drawing labeled "[BEFORE LABEL like De esto...]" showing [BEFORE STATE like a bloated midsection outline with dots/texture], an arrow pointing right to a second drawing labeled "[AFTER LABEL like A esto!]" showing [AFTER STATE like a flatter, smoother midsection outline]. Below the drawings on the whiteboard: marker-style lettering, imperfect and uneven, handwritten text in black marker "[HANDWRITTEN CTA like If you want progress during [PROBLEM], you need this!]". In the foreground: [PERSON'S HAND] holding [YOUR PRODUCT] up next to the whiteboard, positioned in the lower-right of the frame. Product label clearly visible. Shot on iPhone, natural kitchen lighting, casual and educational. 4:5 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Hero Statement + Icon Bar + Offer Burst (Promo)
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design and brand colors precisely. Create: a promotional variant of a hero statement ad on a [BACKGROUND like dark charcoal/moody gray] background. Top 12%: white or light banner with massive bold [DARK COLOR] uppercase sans-serif headline: "[PROVOCATIVE 2-3 WORD STATEMENT like FUPA KILLER.]" with a period for punch. Upper-left of product area: a [BRIGHT ACCENT COLOR like neon green/lime] comic-style starburst badge rotated slightly, reading "GET UP TO [DISCOUNT like 40%] OFF" in bold black text. Center: [PERSON'S HAND] gripping [YOUR PRODUCT] from above, lifting it off its [PACKAGING like retail box] below. Product label and branding clearly visible. Moody, slightly dramatic lighting. Bottom 20%: three evenly spaced icon-and-text benefit columns on a semi-transparent dark strip: [ICON 1 + LABEL like (crossed-out burger) CURB APPETITE] | [ICON 2 + LABEL like (lightning bolt) BURN CALORIES] | [ICON 3 + LABEL like (heart + body) LOSE WEIGHT]. Icons in simple line-art circles with [ACCENT COLOR] highlights. Very bottom: full-width [BRIGHT ACCENT COLOR] banner with bold [DARK] text: "[PROMO like BLACK FRIDAY SPECIAL]". 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: UGC Lifestyle + Product + Review Card (Split)
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product design and brand colors precisely. Create: a vertical split social proof ad. Left 55%: a casual UGC-style photo of [PERSON like a blonde woman in her early 30s, wearing a casual zip-up sweater] enjoying the product in context — [ACTION like sipping an iced drink through a gold metal straw in a bright café setting]. Natural lighting, warm and inviting, iPhone-quality casual feel. The person should look genuinely happy, not posed. Right 45%: solid [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR like deep indigo/purple] background. Top-right: small decorative sparkle/star accents in [ACCENT COLOR like gold/yellow]. Floating center-right: [YOUR PRODUCT] at a slight angle, studio-lit on the colored background. Below product: a white rounded-rectangle review card with: five filled [ACCENT COLOR] stars at top, then italic or casual serif text: "[SHORT REVIEW QUOTE like "I will never get drive-thru coffee again"]" in [BRAND COLOR]. Bottom center: [BRAND LOGO] in white on the colored background, with small decorative sparkle accents. 4:5 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Curiosity Gap + Scroll-Stopper Hook
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference for visual tone ONLY. Do NOT include any product, logo, or branding. Create: a scroll-stopping curiosity ad designed to look like a truncated social media post. Top 35%: clean white background with large bold black sans-serif text (heavy weight, tight leading): "[HOOK HEADLINE like Most [AUDIENCE] don't realize THIS is why [PROBLEM STATEMENT] but did you know]". The last few words should be followed by "...more" in lighter gray text, mimicking a truncated Facebook/Instagram caption that requires clicking "more" to expand. Bottom 65%: a close-up, slightly uncomfortable or attention-grabbing photo of [PROBLEM VISUAL like the specific physical symptom or problem the product solves — shown on the subject, no product visible]. Photo should feel real and editorial, not stock. Slightly shallow depth of field. No text on the photo. No product. No logo. No CTA. The entire purpose is to provoke curiosity and earn the click. 1:1 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Native / Ugly Post-It Note Style (Product Hero)
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact [PRODUCT DESCRIPTION — shape, color, label details, key typography on packaging] precisely. Create: a lifestyle product photo set in [REAL-LIFE SETTING — e.g. warm kitchen floor / bathroom counter / living room coffee table] with [LIGHTING DESCRIPTION — e.g. soft natural daylight from a nearby window / warm diffused morning light] and a naturally blurred background showing [BACKGROUND DETAILS — e.g. lower kitchen cabinets and a dog bowl / mirror edge and steam / couch cushions]. Frame is very slightly off-center — product not perfectly centered, [LEFT / BOTTOM / RIGHT] edge of product very slightly cropped — feels found rather than composed. Slight natural sensor grain consistent with a phone camera in indoor daylight. Subtle natural vignette at frame corners. Center of frame, large and dominant: [FULL PRODUCT DESCRIPTION — packaging colors, key label text, distinguishing visual features] sitting on [SURFACE — e.g. light wood floor / raw wood shelf / marble counter], slightly angled toward the viewer. [SCATTERED SURFACE DETAIL — e.g. a few scattered kibble pieces / sea salt crystals / product crumbs] on the surface around the base of the product for casual realism. Stuck directly onto the front face of the product: a POST-IT COLOR — yellow/green/neon square post-it note, slightly crooked and not perfectly straight — slightly trapezoid from the angle it was pressed on. Realistic paper texture with a horizontal crease across the middle as if it was folded once. Subtle curl at bottom-right corner only. Held at the top by a small piece of [TAPE COLOR — clear / yellow / white] tape, slightly wrinkled — not a self-adhesive strip. One word in the handwriting is slightly heavier-inked or underlined from natural pen pressure. Handwritten in thick black marker-style lettering, imperfect and uneven, lowercase natural writing — not formatted, not centered, not evenly spaced: "[LINE 1 — lowercase, short, setup or hook]" line break "[LINE 2 — continuation or turn]" line break "[LINE 3 — punchline, result, or kicker]" line break "[LINE 4 — optional final beat or emoji]" No attribution line. No signature. Bottom center of frame, outside the photo on a plain white or off-white strip: small plain lowercase sans-serif caption text, looks like someone typed it under an organic post: "[brand url] — [3-5 word casual caption, sounds typed not written]" No logo overlay anywhere in the frame. Brand identity carried entirely by the product packaging visible in the photo. No border. [MOOD — 3 adjectives]. 4:5 aspect ratio.

templates.name: Stat-Led Hero — Product Center with Authority Badge
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors, typography style, and brand tone precisely.

Warm cream/ivory textured background — soft brushstroke or swipe texture of product content (oil or cream or tablet or capsule) running diagonally across the full canvas, suggesting [inside of product like oil or cream or tablet or product]. No hard edges; the surface feels luminous and tactile.

[YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] sits center-frame, slightly below the vertical midpoint, cap or dropper and leaning against the product at a natural angle — product open and inviting, the cream texture visible inside. Shot at 85mm, soft diffuse light from upper-right, very shallow depth of field, warm golden tones.

Upper-left zone (top 45% of canvas): bold stat lead — "[STAT]" in large serif or mixed-weight sans type, followed by a short explanatory phrase in smaller caps. Below that, three single-line benefit callouts in bold uppercase type: [BENEFIT 1], [BENEFIT 2]. Left-aligned, generous line spacing.

Upper-right corner: circular authority badge or award seal — "[TRUST BADGE like SKINCARE AWARD / 2025 WINNER]" — small, elegant, stamped feel.

Bottom 20% of canvas: centered product name in spaced uppercase tracking — "[YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details]" — clean, premium, minimal. Below it, a fine-print disclaimer line in small type: "[CLAIM]".

The scene should feel like a luxury editorial feature — authoritative, ingredient-rich, quietly confident — the kind of product a woman would save for herself.

No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only.

templates.name: Stacked Product Feature Callout
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Center the composition on
[YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] resting on a light [SURFACE], shot
straight-on at eye level with soft, even, diffused daylight and a shallow
background showing a softly blurred [SETTING like a bright modern bathroom
counter with a plant and wood cabinetry]. Reserve the top 25% of the frame for
a bold two-line headline in [DARK BRAND COLOR]: "[YOUR HEADLINE, under 10
words]". Surround the product with 3 minimal hand-drawn line-icon callouts,
each paired with a short bold label in [DARK BRAND COLOR], connected to its
feature via a thin curved arrow pointing at the exact spot on the product it
describes: one icon top-right near the product's opening/texture detail
labeled "[BENEFIT 1]", one icon bottom-left labeled "[BENEFIT 2]", one icon
bottom-right labeled "[BENEFIT 3]". Keep icon style consistent — simple single-
weight black line art, no fill, no color. Add small legal disclaimer text in
light gray at the very bottom edge for any comparative claims. The scene should
feel like a clean, trustworthy product demonstration moment — as if the brand
is patiently walking a new customer through exactly why this product earns its
place on the counter, calm and instructional rather than salesy. No people,
hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only.

templates.name: Callout Lines Feature Benefit Pointout
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a vertical product hero
shot on a softly lit [SURFACE] against a [SETTING like a bright marble
backdrop with natural window light], product placed right-of-center in the
lower two-thirds of the frame with a serving/companion vessel (glass, bowl,
or scoop appropriate to the category) resting just in front of it at
bottom-left. Top third of the frame is clear negative space over the
background surface reserved for a bold two-line headline in [CONTRAST COLOR]
serif type: [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words]. Directly beneath the headline,
place a rounded pill-shaped CTA badge in [ACCENT COLOR] with white text:
[CTA like Save 25% Off]. Down the left side of the frame, run three thin
leader/dotted lines extending horizontally from short benefit labels in
[CONTRAST COLOR] small caps text toward their corresponding point on
[YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] or its companion vessel — each line
terminating in a small dot marker: [BENEFIT 1], [BENEFIT 2], [BENEFIT 3].
Lighting is soft, diffuse, and directional from the upper right, casting a
gentle natural shadow beneath the product for depth. No people, hands, faces,
or body parts — product and props only. The scene should feel like a clean,
trustworthy countertop moment — the kind of considered, almost clinical
presentation that makes a wellness ritual feel credible and inviting rather
than clinical or sterile.

templates.name: Callout-Annotated Feature Bowl (Pet/Food Benefit Pointout)
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical 9:16 lifestyle-diagram
hybrid on a [SURFACE like a dark wooden countertop]. Top third: a hand/arm
in frame pouring [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] from its package
into view, with [PET/SUBJECT like an eager dog] leaning in close, tongue or
gesture showing anticipation. Center-lower two-thirds: a clear glass bowl
filled with [YOUR PRODUCT], shot top-down at a slight angle so texture and
ingredients are visible. Around the bowl and subject, place 4-5 curved
white leader-line arrows, each pointing to a specific zone of the product
or package and ending in a short bold white callout label naming one
[BENEFIT 1-4] (e.g. freshness, ingredient quality, preparation method,
convenience). One callout near the top should sit inside a soft white
pill-shaped badge for emphasis (e.g. a delivery or convenience claim).
Lighting is soft, warm, and natural, shallow depth of field on the
background, colors true-to-life and appetizing. The scene should feel like
a real, unscripted moment of feeding time — a trusted routine the subject
looks forward to, not a staged product shot. Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON] —
someone living with [AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY]. The visible hand/arm and
subject's posture should evoke [AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY], not a
model selling a product. Keep all callout text short (2-5 words), high
contrast white on the darker surface, legible at a glance.

templates.name: Starter Kit Callout Grid
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Solid [BACKGROUND] color fills
the entire canvas — flat, even, no gradient or texture. Top 25% holds a
centered two-line bold [SHORT HEADLINE] in [DARK BRAND COLOR] serif or
condensed type, with a smaller centered subhead below it in [ACCENT COLOR]
stating [YOUR OFFER like Free Gift for a Limited Time]. Below the headline,
arrange [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] as the hero element
angled slightly and placed right-of-center, with 2-3 companion kit
components (a secondary tool, a small accessory, a soft pouch or case)
scattered around it at varied angles on the left and lower-left, all
floating on the flat background with soft drop shadows, no surface or
table implied. Each component has a thin leader line pointing to a short
bold callout label naming one [BENEFIT 1-4] positioned in the negative
space beside it, set in [CONTRAST COLOR] text on the [BACKGROUND]. The
scene narrative: the arrangement should feel like an honest, no-fuss
product tour — as if someone unboxed the kit and is walking a friend
through exactly what's inside and why each piece earns its place, building
quiet confidence through clarity rather than hype. No people, hands,
faces, or body parts — product and props only. Lighting is soft, even,
shadowless studio light with no visible surface or backdrop seam. Overall
mood: [MOOD].

templates.name: Held-Up Product with Orbiting Benefit Callouts
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical 9:16 layout. Top 20%
of the frame holds [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words] in bold centered white
text over a softly blurred background. Directly beneath it, a horizontal
trust row shows a star rating icon, [BRAND] wordmark or [SOCIAL PROOF]
platform name, [STAR RATING like five gold stars], and [REVIEW COUNT] in
small caps. Center-lower third of the frame: a hand and forearm enters
from the bottom edge, holding [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details]
upright at chest height, product face angled toward camera. Around the
product, three short benefit callouts ([BENEFIT 1-4]) are placed in the
negative space at upper-left, upper-right, and mid-left, each connected to
the product by a thin curved arrow pointing inward toward it. Bottom-left
corner holds a circular badge with [DISCOUNT like 20%] and [URGENCY PHRASE
like today only]. Background is a softly out-of-focus real-world setting
([SETTING like a bright modern office with plants]) with warm, diffuse
natural light, shallow depth of field so the product and hand stay sharp
while the environment falls away. No people, hands, faces, or body parts
beyond the single arm holding the product — do not add additional people
or extra visible faces. The scene should feel like a real person just
picked up their own delivery and is showing it off mid-review — candid,
credible, unstaged, not a studio product shot.

templates.name: Six-Panel Lifestyle Grid Launch
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Build a 2-column × 3-row photo
grid with even gutters (thin [BACKGROUND] borders separating each cell).
Five of the six cells are lifestyle/detail photographs of [AUDIENCE PERSON]
wearing or using [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] in a bright,
neutral studio setting — vary the crops across cells: one full-body pose,
one close-up detail of texture or fit, one three-quarter walking pose, one
back/rear detail shot, one seated or candid gesture. Soft, even diffuse
daylight, shallow depth of field on detail shots, neutral seamless [BACKGROUND]
backdrop throughout so every cell feels shot in the same session. The
remaining sixth cell (any grid position) is a solid [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR]
color panel containing only text: "[SHORT HEADLINE]" as a small eyebrow line
above "[YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words]" in a larger weight, with the
[BRAND] logo sitting below in [CONTRAST COLOR]. The scene should feel like a
quiet seasonal drop reveal — understated, premium, and confident, like the
product is arriving into someone's existing wardrobe rather than being sold
to them. Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON] — someone living with [AUDIENCE DAILY
REALITY]. Her expression and posture should evoke [AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL
IDENTITY], not a model selling a product.

templates.name: Muse-to-Business 4-Panel Grid Reveal
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a clean 2x2 grid split by
a thin white gutter, four equal quadrants each labeled top-left with small
bold black caption text on a soft off-white background. Top-left quadrant:
a warm, candid outdoor lifestyle photo of [AUDIENCE PERSON], soft natural
daylight, genuine joyful expression, labeled "The Muse:" — this is the
emotional spark/inspiration moment. Top-right quadrant: a flat-lay of
[YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] alongside 2-3 branded merchandise
or lifestyle mockup items in a matching motif on a neutral cream background,
soft studio light, labeled "The Idea:" — this is the concept taking shape.
Bottom-left quadrant: a close-up hand-held smartphone screen showing a mobile
storefront or product listing page featuring [YOUR PRODUCT with key
packaging details], labeled "The Business:" — this is the idea made real and
sellable. Bottom-right quadrant: centered on a plain background, a large
clean wordmark reading [BRAND], labeled "The How:" — the enabling
tool/platform reveal. Each quadrant keeps generous negative space around its
subject so the caption text stays legible. No people, hands, faces, or body
parts in quadrants two, three, or four — product, screen, and logo only. The
overall arrangement should feel like a relatable origin story: a spontaneous,
personal moment of affection or delight quietly transforming step-by-step
into a real, tangible small business — approachable, inspiring, and
achievable rather than staged or corporate.

templates.name: Texture Grid Promo Mosaic
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a tight 4-column by 6-row
grid of full-bleed square close-up tiles, each tile filling its cell edge-to-edge
with no gutters or borders between tiles. Each tile shows a macro, cropped detail
of [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] or its material/texture in a
different [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR]/[ACCENT COLOR]/[SOFT BRAND COLOR like lavender/
light purple] colorway — folds, weaves, ridges, or surface texture shot at a
slight angle with soft, even studio light so every tile reads as premium and
tactile. In the exact center of the grid, two of the tiles are replaced by a
single merged [BACKGROUND] solid-color panel spanning a 2x2 block, left-aligned
text set in bold [DARK BRAND COLOR] sans-serif: [SHORT HEADLINE] as a large
top line and [YOUR OFFER like Free Shipping over $50] as a smaller line beneath
it. The grid should feel like an abundant, color-coded catalog wall that turns
variety itself into the value proposition — so many options that the offer in
the center feels like the reward for browsing. No people, hands, faces, or
body parts — product and props only.

templates.name: Open-Jar Shade Grid
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a top-down flat-lay grid
of 9-12 identical open jars of [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details],
arranged in three even rows across a clean [BACKGROUND] backdrop, each jar
lid removed and set just behind or beside it so the textured product surface
inside is fully visible. Every jar shows a different shade/variant of the
same formula, creating a color-swatch effect across the grid — rich, glossy,
finger-swiped textures with soft indentation marks as if just tested. Top
20% of the canvas is reserved as a clean text zone: a small bold [URGENCY
PHRASE like Limited Offer] eyebrow line, a two-line [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10
words] in bold serif type with alternating lines highlighted on soft
[SOFT BRAND COLOR like lavender/light purple] pill backgrounds, and a bold
all-caps supporting line naming the product news below it. Lighting is
bright, even, and diffused from directly above — soft shadows only under
each jar rim, true-to-life color rendering so shade variation reads clearly.
No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only. The
arrangement should feel like a beauty editor's shade wall — abundant,
covetable, and inviting the viewer to imagine trying "just one more."

templates.name: Shade Swatch Texture Grid
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Create a 3x3 macro grid, each
cell an extreme close-up crop showing [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging
details] with its applicator tip raised and a swipe of product texture
resting just above the nozzle against a small area of bare skin. Arrange
three horizontal rows, one per shade/variant of [PRODUCT], moving from
lightest to deepest tone top to bottom: row 1 in [SHADE 1 like sheer
ivory], row 2 in [SHADE 2 like soft rose], row 3 in [SHADE 3 like deep
berry]. Within each row, show three sequential angles of the same texture
swipe — smooth dome, stretched peak, textured swirl — so the grid reads
as a stop-motion study of product consistency. Background is pure white
[BACKGROUND], seamless, with clean vertical and horizontal hairline
gutters separating each of the 9 cells. Lighting is bright, even, and
shadowless — soft studio light from directly above, macro lens, extremely
shallow depth of field so only the applicator tip and texture swipe are in
crisp focus. No people, hands, faces, or full body parts — only a small
neutral patch of bare skin is visible in each cell as a texture-testing
surface, never a recognizable hand, finger, or face. The arrangement
should feel like a meticulous lab-grade shade and texture study — precise,
tactile, and reassuring, as if inviting the viewer to trust exactly what
each shade will look and feel like before they buy. No text, logos, or
copy anywhere in the grid — visuals only.

templates.name: Build-Your-Own Kit — Product Variant Grid
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a soft pastel solid
[BACKGROUND] backdrop, full-bleed. Top 12% centers the [BRAND] wordmark logo.
Below it, centered headline block: a small eyebrow line "[SHORT HEADLINE]" in
[ACCENT COLOR], then a bold two-line hero headline "[YOUR HEADLINE, under 10
words]" in [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] and [DARK BRAND COLOR] mixed-weight type,
followed by a one-sentence [YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence] in smaller gray text.
Directly under the headline, a small star-rating badge showing [STAR RATING
like five gold stars] and "[REVIEW COUNT]" in a rounded pill. The remaining
60% of the canvas is a clean 2-column x 3-row grid of six product cards, each
card showing [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] standing upright,
label facing forward, on a transparent background, with its own accent-tinted
soft radial glow matching that variant's color-code. Under each product, a
bold product/variant name label, and 1–2 of the six cards carry a small
angled badge callout such as "[CLAIM]" or "[BENEFIT 1-4]" in a bright pill
tag. Grid spacing is even and generous, product sizes matched across all six
cells so the eye compares them as a family/kit rather than individual heroes.
The scene should feel like a friendly product catalog page inviting the
viewer to mix-and-match and build a personalized kit — approachable,
colorful, and confidence-building rather than clinical. No people, hands,
faces, or body parts — product and props only. A fine-print disclaimer line
sits at the very bottom in small gray text.

templates.name: Product Variant Grid Showcase
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Design a 4:5 poster on a solid
[SOFT BRAND COLOR like pale blue/off-white] background. Top 15% holds a
bold, centered two-line headline in [DARK BRAND COLOR] serif type:
[YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words]. Center 65% of the canvas is a rounded-corner
white card containing a clean 4-column x 4-row grid of [YOUR PRODUCT with key
packaging details] shown in [BENEFIT 1-4] variant colors/finishes, each item
neatly folded or stacked and evenly spaced with consistent soft studio
lighting and subtle drop shadows, shot from a straight-on angle so every
variant reads clearly at a glance. Bottom 20% is centered on the white card
background: [BRAND] logo in [DARK BRAND COLOR], followed by a short tagline
[SHORT HEADLINE] in a lighter weight directly beneath it. Generous even
margins frame the card against the solid background. The arrangement should
feel like a well-organized shelf display — abundant, tidy, and reassuring,
communicating that this single product line offers a color or variant for
every taste. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only.

templates.name: Variant Grid Showcase — 6-Up Color Block Swatches
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Build a 2-row by 3-column grid,
each cell a distinct flat [BACKGROUND] block in a different variant-coded hue,
filling roughly the top 85% of the canvas. In every cell, center
[YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] standing upright at a slight tilt,
positioned in the lower-middle third of the cell, with a soft matching-tone
drop shadow beneath it. Behind each product, place one large soft-edged smear
or swatch of the product's texture/content in a tone that harmonizes with that
cell's background, positioned upper-center so it peeks out from behind the
product without covering it. In the top-left corner of each cell, print the
variant name in [SHORT HEADLINE]-style small caps, [DARK BRAND COLOR] or
[CONTRAST COLOR] text depending on background contrast. Studio lighting is
soft, even, and shadowless, straight-on product angle, consistent across all
six cells so the grid reads as one cohesive set. Below the grid, a full-width
[BACKGROUND] band holds the [BRAND] wordmark and [PRODUCT CATEGORY] name in
large type on the left, a one-line [YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence] beneath it,
and a rectangular [CTA like Shop Now] button in [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] on the
right edge. The arrangement should feel like a color-and-flavor wall display
brought to life digitally — playful, collectible, and abundant, inviting the
viewer to imagine choosing their favorite from a full range rather than
settling for one option. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and
props only.

templates.name: Three-Step Ease-of-Use Triptych
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a three-panel vertical
grid splitting the frame into equal thirds, each panel separated by a thin
white gutter. Each panel shows [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] from
a slightly different angle against a soft neutral [BACKGROUND], with a single
human hand demonstrating one step of using the product in close-up macro
detail: panel one shows liquid or contents being added/filled into the
product opening, panel two shows a hand lifting or carrying the product by
its handle or grip point, panel three shows a hand wiping or cleaning a
surface of the product with a cloth or sponge. Lighting is soft, diffuse,
and consistent across all three panels so they read as one continuous
photoshoot. Each panel carries small white caption text at the top reading
"easy to" followed by a bold, oversized [ACCENT COLOR like neon yellow-green]
action word beneath it (e.g. FILL / CARRY / CLEAN — replace with three verbs
matching the product's real use steps), with [BRAND] logo lockup placed
small and centered near the bottom of each panel. The scene should feel like
a quick, reassuring product demo — as if a friend is showing you exactly how
simple this is to use in real life, panel by panel. Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON] —
someone living with [AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY]. Her hands, gestures, and pacing
should evoke [AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY], not a model performing for a
camera. Keep framing tight and cropped so only hands, product, and gentle
background bokeh are visible — no full faces or bodies in frame.

templates.name: Four-Panel Brand Grid — Offer, Product Duo, Pour Shot, Testimonial Face
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a 2x2 grid, four equal
quadrants, no gutters, hard edges between panels. Top-left quadrant: solid
[PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] background, [BRAND] logo/wordmark upper-left, below it
a short serif or editorial-style headline [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words]
offering [YOUR OFFER like Free Shipping over $50], one supporting line
[YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence], and a small text-link style CTA [CTA like Refer
a Friend Today] with an arrow glyph — all left-aligned on generous negative
space. Top-right quadrant: flat neutral [BACKGROUND] studio surface, [YOUR
PRODUCT with key packaging details] shown as a duo (two complementary pack
formats side by side, e.g. pouch + jar), soft even top-down light, minimal
shadow, centered composition. Bottom-left quadrant: close-up hero shot of
[YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] resting on a natural wood or stone
surface with a folded textile in the corner, [KEY INGREDIENT] elements
(capsules, drops, granules, or powder) captured mid-fall or scattered beside
it to imply freshness and potency, warm directional light, shallow depth of
field. Bottom-right quadrant: cropped lifestyle portrait of [AUDIENCE PERSON]
mid-laugh or candid smile, hair or fabric caught in motion by a light breeze,
soft outdoor or window light, shot close on face and shoulders, with a small
semi-transparent text panel overlaid in the lower third carrying [SOCIAL
PROOF] or [CLAIM] copy in fine print. Cast her expression and posture to
evoke [AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY], not a generic stock model. The
arrangement should feel like a single confident brand moment split into four
beats — an invitation, the product itself, the ritual of using it, and the
real person who trusts it — each quadrant reinforcing the others rather than
repeating the same shot.

templates.name: Checklist Grid Roundup
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Create a 4-column, 5-row evenly
spaced grid of isolated product photos on a solid [BACKGROUND like matte black]
background, each cell holding a single clean studio cutout of [YOUR PRODUCT
with key packaging details] or a related item from the same use-case category,
lit softly and neutrally with no shadows or props, small icon-scale framing so
the grid reads as a curated collection rather than a single hero shot. Interrupt
the grid at vertical-center with a text block spanning the full width across
roughly 2 grid-row-heights: bold, centered [CONTRAST COLOR] sans-serif headline
reading [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words], sitting directly on the [BACKGROUND]
with no card or panel behind it. Maintain generous even gutters between all grid
cells so each product stays visually distinct. No people, hands, faces, or body
parts — product and props only. The arrangement should feel like a trustworthy,
expertly curated checklist or buying guide — abundant, organized, and
authoritative, as if every essential item has already been vetted and assembled
for the viewer so they don't have to search themselves.

templates.name: Bold Headline Over UI Screenshot Card
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Full-bleed [SOFT BRAND COLOR like lavender/light purple] solid background with a very faint grid-line texture for subtle depth. Top 40% of the frame is clear negative space holding [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words] in large, bold, tight-tracking serif type in [DARK BRAND COLOR] — break the headline across two lines, with one key word boxed or outlined in [ACCENT COLOR] to draw the eye. Centered in the lower 55% of the frame, floating with a soft drop shadow, is a clean UI screenshot card (rounded corners, white background) showing [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] represented as its own product interface — a simplified dashboard/app view with a colored icon badge top-left, a short module title, 2-3 horizontal content rows or timeline bars in [ACCENT COLOR] and [SOFT BRAND COLOR like lavender/light purple], and one small circular avatar or checkmark icon. The card should look like a real, functional screenshot, not decorative art — sharp edges, legible micro-text, believable UI spacing. [BRAND] logo and wordmark centered at the very bottom in [DARK BRAND COLOR]. The scene should feel like a confident, no-fluff software ad — the product screenshot floats like tangible proof beneath a punchy claim, reassuring the viewer that the promise above is real and already built. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only.

templates.name: Vibrant Gradient Headline with Floating Interface Cards
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Full-bleed vibrant diagonal
gradient background sweeping from [ACCENT COLOR like magenta/pink] in the
upper-left through [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] to [ACCENT COLOR like orange/coral]
in the lower-right, smooth and glowing, no texture. Top third holds a bold,
large, tightly-kerned two-line headline in white: [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10
words], with a smaller white subhead beneath it: [YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence].
Center of the frame shows a fanned, overlapping stack of 3-5 rounded-corner
interface/feature cards for [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details],
tilted at slightly different angles like a shuffled deck, each card showing
a distinct product feature panel (chat, dashboard, notification, data view)
in clean white or light UI style with small accent-colored icons, softly
faded at the outer edges into the gradient to feel like they're floating in
light. Bottom section is reserved for [BRAND] logo lockup on a small dark
pill/badge, with a short all-caps CTA line beneath it: [CTA like TRY IT
TODAY]. Lighting is soft and even with a gentle glow radiating from the card
stack. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only. The
scene should feel like a single confident idea cutting through digital
clutter — bright, modern, and energizing, like discovering the one tool that
finally brings order to chaos.

templates.name: Big Question Hook — Pet Portrait with Scroll-Stop Callout
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Full-bleed vertical outdoor
portrait of [SUBJECT ANIMAL/PET, breed and pose matching target audience's pet]
standing proudly on natural terrain (rocks, grass, or a trail) with a soft
out-of-focus green landscape and pale sky behind, warm late-afternoon light,
shot at eye level like a candid hero portrait, shallow depth of field keeping
the animal tack-sharp against a blurred background. Overlay a huge, bold,
hand-lettered marker-style headline "[YOUR HEADLINE, under 6 words]" in white
across the upper-middle third, with a small hand-drawn arrow or scribble accent
pointing toward it. Add a smaller circled, tilted callout badge near the
subject reading "[SHORT HEADLINE]" in white script on the [ACCENT COLOR]
outline, positioned beside the animal's head or body. Below that, place a
one-line white [YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence] centered on two lines. At the
bottom, a solid [ACCENT COLOR] rounded-pill CTA button contains
"[CTA like SHOP NOW]" in bold white text. No other people, hands, faces, or
human body parts anywhere in frame — animal and natural setting only. The
scene should feel like a real, joyful outdoor moment caught mid-stride —
warm, playful, and full of vitality, not a staged studio shot. Vibrant true-
to-life color grading, natural sunlight, no artificial studio backdrop.

templates.name: Monochrome Lineup — Product Trio on Color-Block Backdrop
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a vertical 9:16 ad on a
single-tone [SOFT BRAND COLOR like blush pink] background that fades subtly
from a slightly deeper tone at top to a lighter tone at the bottom third,
where it meets a matching-tone tiled or textured surface. Top third is a
clear text zone, center-aligned: [BRAND] logo/wordmark in [CONTRAST COLOR],
a small kicker line in [PRODUCT CATEGORY] directly beneath it, then
[YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words] set in an elegant serif in [CONTRAST COLOR]
a bit lower, with generous negative space separating each line. Middle-to-
lower two-thirds shows three units of [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging
details] lined up evenly side by side, front labels facing forward, resting
on the tiled surface — treat them as a matched trio/family lineup rather
than a single hero unit. Light is soft, even, and shadowless, typical of a
seamless studio cyclorama, so the product colors and background blend into
one continuous tonal field. Bottom edge holds a small centered retailer or
availability line, e.g. [CTA like AVAILABLE NOW FROM [RETAILER]], in
[CONTRAST COLOR] with a small logo mark beside it. No people, hands, faces,
or body parts — product and props only. The scene should feel like a clean,
confident retail moment — minimal, tonal, and elevated, as if the product
line itself is the design element, radiating quiet consistency and premium
simplicity rather than urgency or promotion.

templates.name: Joyful Hero Hold — Solid Backdrop Headline
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Full-bleed solid [BACKGROUND]
backdrop fills the frame — no texture, no props, just flat saturated color.
Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON] — someone living with [AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY] —
positioned center-right, shoulders and face angled toward camera, eyes
softly closed, caught mid-laugh. She holds [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging
details] up against her cheek/jaw with one hand, her other hand relaxed near
her collarbone, hair falling loose across her shoulder. Shot at 85mm f/2.2,
soft even frontal light, minimal shadow, clean beauty-editorial finish.
Top 15% of frame holds a bold sans-serif kicker: [SHORT HEADLINE] over a
smaller [PRODUCT CATEGORY] label, both in [CONTRAST COLOR]. Bottom third is
reserved as a clear text zone over her shoulder/torso for a large serif
[YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words] stacked across two lines, with a smaller
availability line and retailer/brand logo mark beneath it. The scene should
feel like an unguarded, delighted moment of self-care — as if she just
discovered her new favorite step in the routine and couldn't stop smiling
about it. Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON]; her expression and posture should evoke
[AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY], not a model selling a product.

templates.name: Beachside Hero with Bold Headline Overlay
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a vertical 9:16 hero shot.
Left 45% of the frame shows [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] standing
upright on soft [SURFACE like fine beach sand], shot at eye level with a
shallow depth of field so the background softly blurs. A single [SETTING like
a tropical beach with turquoise water and pale sky] fills the backdrop,
sun-bright and airy. A delicate natural prop (e.g. a white tropical flower)
rests beside the product on the sand, angled toward camera, adding a organic,
sensorial accent. Right 55% of the frame is open negative sky-and-water space
reserved for text: place [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words] in large, bold,
condensed uppercase [DARK BRAND COLOR] type stacked in two lines near the
upper-right third, followed below by smaller tracked-out uppercase text
showing [PRODUCT CATEGORY] and [PRODUCT], in [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR]. Lighting
is bright, natural, diffused daylight with soft directional highlights on the
product's surface to show texture and sheen. No people, hands, faces, or body
parts — product and props only. The scene should feel like an effortless
sun-drenched escape — breezy, confident, and indulgent, as if the product
itself just arrived on vacation with you.

templates.name: Editorial Headline + Dual Hero Pour Shot
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a 9:16 vertical layout on
a soft [BACKGROUND] surface. Upper-right zone (top 30%, right 45%) shows a
close-cropped hand tipping [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] out of
its container into a second upright unit of [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging
details] positioned mid-frame-right, contents mid-fall to suggest freshness
and abundance. Left 55% of the upper two-thirds is a clean negative-space
text zone in [BACKGROUND] holding [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words] set in a
serif display face, with one key phrase in italic for emphasis. Lower third:
a second full hero unit of [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] stands
large and centered-left as the dominant product moment, label facing camera,
soft studio shadow beneath. Bottom-right corner holds a compact text stack —
[YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence] above a rounded pill-shaped [CTA like SAVE UP TO
20%] button in [ACCENT COLOR]. Lighting is bright, even, diffuse studio light
with soft shadows; palette stays neutral and airy so [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR]
reads clearly on the packaging. Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON] — someone living with
[AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY] — implied only through the pouring hand, not a full
figure; the gesture should read as a caring, personal ritual rather than a
commercial demo, evoking [AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY]. The arrangement
should feel like a quiet, confident daily ritual — this product is a trusted
staple someone reaches for by hand, not a passive object on a shelf. Include
required disclaimer text in small type at the very bottom.

templates.name: Split-Panel Influencer Review + Real-Life Moment
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical split composition:
left 35% of frame is a solid [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] panel holding the
[BRAND] logo top-left, a five-star rating row beneath it, a bold pull-quote
below that reading "[PULL-QUOTE — the most emotional 4-8 word phrase from
the review]," and [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] resting at the
bottom of the panel, angled slightly and well-lit against the solid
background. Two small rounded-pill badges sit just under the product
listing [BENEFIT 1-2]. Right 65% of frame is a full-bleed outdoor lifestyle
photograph: [AUDIENCE PERSON] shown mid-scene in [SETTING like a cobblestone
European plaza with a stone fountain and café awnings], captured candidly
from a slight distance in natural daylight, soft directional light, shallow
depth of field, travel-documentary framing. A small circular profile
photo with an "@[HANDLE]" username tag is overlaid near the bottom-right
corner of the lifestyle photo, mimicking an Instagram Story repost. Cast
[AUDIENCE PERSON] — someone living with [AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY]. Her
