cream serif type. Middle 35%: a clean white comparison card with rounded
corners, floating on the gradient with a soft drop shadow — two right-aligned
columns headed "[BRAND]" and "OTHERS", five left-aligned benefit rows
([BENEFIT 1-4] plus one more), each row scored with a solid dark checkmark
circle under the brand column and a black X circle under "Others". Bottom 45%:
[YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] placed front and center resting on
a warm-lit surface, angled slightly toward camera, label facing forward and
fully legible, with a single natural prop referencing [KEY INGREDIENT] resting
beside or leaning against the product to reinforce ingredient authenticity.
Studio lighting is warm, directional, and glowing from behind the product,
casting a soft rim light and long warm shadow across the surface; shallow
depth of field keeps the product razor-sharp while the gradient background
falls softly out of focus. The scene should feel like quiet, confident proof —
a brand stating its superiority plainly and letting a clean side-by-side
scorecard do the convincing, with the product itself grounding the claim in
something tangible and real. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product
and props only.

templates.name: Comparison Checklist Hero Bottle
templates.template: Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors, typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical 9:16 canvas on a warm gradient background sweeping from [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] at the top corners to a deeper glow of [ACCENT COLOR] pooling behind the product at the bottom. Top 10% holds a two-line headline: "[YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words]" set in clean serif type, [CONTRAST COLOR], with the second line italicized for emphasis. Directly below, a borderless two-column comparison table spans the middle 45% of the frame: left column header is "[BRAND]", right column header is "OTHERS", both in small tracked-out caps. Seven rows list [BENEFIT 1-4] and additional claim rows, each preceded by a checkmark icon in [CONTRAST COLOR] on the brand side and an X icon in a muted rose tone on the "others" side, separated by thin hairline dividers in low-opacity white. Bottom 45% of the frame is reserved for [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details], centered, resting upright as if placed on an unseen surface, lit with a soft radial glow that matches the background gradient pooling beneath it, casting a subtle warm rim light along one edge. The product sits below the table with generous breathing room, positioned as the visual resolution to the claims above it. The scene should feel like a confident, editorial verdict has just been delivered — as though the comparison itself proves superiority before the viewer even looks at the product, so the bottle arrives as calm, earned proof rather than a hard sell. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only.

templates.name: Split-Screen Superiority Showdown
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a vertical split-screen
comparison on a near-black background. Top third holds a bold two-line
centered headline in clean white sans-serif type: [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10
words]. Below the headline, a faint vertical dotted line divides the frame
into two halves. Left half is lit with a warm, dramatic top-down spotlight
that fades to black at the edges; it showcases [YOUR PRODUCT with key
packaging details] as the hero, rendered large and glossy with strong
directional highlights. Above it sits the [BRAND] wordmark in [ACCENT COLOR].
Right half is lit with a cooler, flatter, dimmer light and is labeled "OTHER
[PRODUCT CATEGORY]" in small gray caps; it shows a generic, dull, featureless
competitor container in muted gray, deliberately less flattering and less
lit than the hero side. Beneath both halves, stack three rows of a feature
comparison: each row states one [BENEFIT 1-4] in white text with a green
checkmark aligned under the left (hero) column and a red X aligned under the
right (competitor) column. A small disclaimer note sits in the bottom
corner. Lighting is moody, high-contrast, studio-dramatic with a warm-vs-cool
temperature split reinforcing the "us vs them" divide. The scene narrative:
the arrangement should feel like a courtroom verdict rendered in light itself
— one side glowing with proof and vitality, the other left flat, generic,
and unconvincing, so the viewer instantly reads superiority before reading a
single word. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and props
only.

templates.name: Us vs. Them — Product Bundle vs. Expensive Alternative
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Top 10% is a bold centered
headline on a soft [BACKGROUND] gradient: "[YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words]".
Below it, split the canvas into two facing sides: left 50% shows [YOUR PRODUCT
with key packaging details] arranged as a hero bundle (product plus any
companion items) on a clean surface with soft studio light; right 50% shows
[COMPETITOR CATEGORY like an expensive injection or device], rendered
generically (not a real brand), lit slightly cooler and more clinical to feel
less inviting. Directly beneath each side, place a bold price callout:
left shows a struck-through original price and a highlighted lower price in
[ACCENT COLOR]; right shows the competitor's ongoing/recurring cost in red.
Below both, a single shared comparison table spans the full width with 3-5
rows, each row a plain-language benefit stated as "our way" with a green
checkmark on the left column and "their way" with a red X on the right
column. Bottom 12% is a large, high-contrast pill-shaped CTA button in
[PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] with bold white text: "[CTA like GET $100 OFF + FREE
GIFTS]". Flat, evenly lit product photography throughout, no dramatic shadows —
clarity and legibility take priority over mood lighting. No people,
hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only. The layout should
feel like an obvious, guilt-free choice is being laid out point by point:
confident, transparent, slightly cheeky in tone, never defensive.

templates.name: Checklist Comparison Table with Hero Product Trio
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Top 8% is a centered logo lockup
for [BRAND] on a [BACKGROUND] solid background. Below it, a centered
three-line headline in [DARK BRAND COLOR], [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words],
serif or confident display type. Middle 45% of the canvas is a comparison
table on the same [BACKGROUND]: two right-aligned column headers reading
"[BRAND]" in a small [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] rounded badge with "VS" between it
and "Others" in [DARK BRAND COLOR]. Below the headers, stack 4-5 left-aligned
rows of [BENEFIT 1-4], each with a green circular checkmark icon under the
[BRAND] column and a grey circular x icon under the "Others" column, thin
hairline dividers between rows. Bottom 35% of the canvas transitions to a
soft [SOFT BRAND COLOR like sand/beige] surface and shows [YOUR PRODUCT with
key packaging details] presented three times side by side at different
angles or in different configurations (e.g. folded, three-quarter view,
front-facing) to showcase form and function, product-only, no props, soft
even studio light, slight drop shadow grounding each unit on the surface. No
people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only. The overall
composition should feel like a confident, no-nonsense buyer's-guide moment —
the instant a shopper who has already tried competitors realizes this is the
smarter, more obvious choice, calm and matter-of-fact rather than
salesy. Typography is clean, generous whitespace, editorial and trustworthy
rather than promotional.

templates.name: Split-Screen Us vs. Them Pack Comparison
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical split-screen composition:
left 50% is a [SOFT BRAND COLOR like cream/off-white] solid background
representing "the old way," right 50% is a [DARK BRAND COLOR like deep forest
green] solid background representing "[BRAND]'s way." A small circular badge
straddles the exact center seam at the top third, containing the word "VS" in
bold type, half-colored to match each side. Below the badge, the competitor's
generic product name appears in muted [ACCENT COLOR] type on the left; [BRAND]
appears in bold white/contrast type on the right. Centered in the lower-left
half, show a plain, generic-looking [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details]
rendered in a dull, undifferentiated tone with a small circular inset callout
showing a mundane label detail (e.g. a stamped date or fine print). Centered in
the lower-right half, show [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] rendered
vividly in true brand colors and finish, with a matching circular inset callout
showing a reassuring label detail. Beneath each product, stack 3 short
comparison lines inside a soft rounded-rectangle outline: the left outline uses
an [ACCENT COLOR like muted coral] stroke with an "X" glyph before each
downside line; the right outline uses a bold [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] stroke with
a checkmark glyph before each upside line. Typography throughout is clean,
rounded sans-serif, generous line spacing, small caps for labels. No people,
hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only. The scene should feel
like a clinical, confident side-by-side verdict — the left half quietly
unappealing and dated, the right half fresh, trustworthy, and obviously the
better choice, so the comparison reads as self-evident rather than argued.
Overall mood: [MOOD].

templates.name: Would You Rather — Split Choice Comparison
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Design a vertical split-choice
comparison ad on a soft [BACKGROUND] gradient (light-to-mid tone, single hue).
Top center: bold headline "[YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words]" in [DARK BRAND COLOR],
large rounded sans-serif. A thin vertical divider line in [ACCENT COLOR] splits
the canvas into two equal halves below the headline. Left half ("Option A"):
the undesirable everyday alternative — an easily recognizable everyday object or
product representing the problem, centered, photographed as a clean isolated
studio object with soft shadow. Right half ("Option B"): [YOUR PRODUCT with key
packaging details] centered at the same scale and vertical position as the left
object, with a small stat callout above it reading "[STAT]" in bold [DARK BRAND
COLOR] type with a supporting one-line detail beneath in smaller type. Below each
object, one short line of body copy in [DARK BRAND COLOR]: left side states the
pain of the old way ("[BENEFIT 1]" framed as a drawback), right side states the
desired outcome ("[BENEFIT 2]" framed as a win). At the bottom of each half, a
small circular badge with a bold letter ("A" / "B") in [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR]
outline matching the divider. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product
and props only. The scene should feel like a quick, obvious gut-check the viewer
answers in one glance — playful but pointed, making the "right" choice feel
self-evident without saying it outright.

templates.name: Format Switch Split-Panel Checklist
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a vertical split-panel
comparison. Left 50% of the canvas is a solid [SOFT BRAND COLOR like sage
green] background; right 50% is a solid white or [BACKGROUND] field, divided
by a clean vertical seam down the center. Near the top, stack two bold
headline bars in [ACCENT COLOR like mustard yellow] highlight blocks
spanning the seam, set in a bold serif/rounded typeface in [DARK BRAND
COLOR]: [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words] framed as a personal switching
story (e.g. "Why I Switched from [OLD FORMAT] to [YOUR PRODUCT with key
packaging details]"). At the vertical center, straddling the seam, render
[YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] mid-transformation — visually
morphing from the old, undesirable format on the right into the appealing
new format on the left — as the single hero object bridging both halves.
Below the headline, place two vertical checklist columns: left column uses
green circular checkmarks listing [BENEFIT 1-4] in short 2-4 word phrases;
right column uses red circular X marks listing the old format's drawbacks
in short 2-4 word phrases. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product
and props only. The arrangement should feel like an honest, personal
before/after confession — the visual split and the mid-morph hero object
communicate a decisive, satisfying upgrade from a frustrating old habit to
an easy new one.

templates.name: Us vs. Them — Stacked Category Comparison
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Design a vertical split-panel
comparison layout on a [BACKGROUND] solid background. Top third: centered
bold headline "[SHORT HEADLINE]" in [DARK BRAND COLOR] all-caps. Upper half
below it shows a generic, unbranded competitor version of [PRODUCT CATEGORY]
angled in 3/4 perspective on the left third, with a stacked list of 3-4
warning-style callouts on the right two-thirds, each paired with a small
warning/caution icon and short negative claim in dark neutral text (e.g.
"[BENEFIT 1]", labeled as a drawback). A thin horizontal rule spans the
canvas with a centered "VS." wordmark dividing the two halves. Lower half
mirrors the same composition: [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details]
angled in the same 3/4 perspective on the left third, brand logo "[BRAND]"
in [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] placed above its callout list, and a stacked list
of 3-4 affirmative callouts on the right two-thirds, each paired with a
green checkmark icon in [ACCENT COLOR] and a short positive claim (e.g.
"[BENEFIT 1-4]"). Studio lighting, soft even diffusion, no harsh shadows,
clean flat-lay commercial product photography, high clarity, plenty of
negative space around each product render. No people, hands, faces, or
body parts — product and props only. The arrangement should feel like an
at-a-glance verdict — the kind of side-by-side comparison a skeptical
shopper pulls up right before checkout to confirm they're not settling for
the inferior, riskier option.

templates.name: Split-Panel Us vs. Them Product Showdown
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Create a vertical split-panel
comparison graphic divided exactly down the middle. Left 50% panel uses a
[SOFT BRAND COLOR like lavender/light purple] solid or subtle gradient
background — top shows [BRAND] logo and [SHORT HEADLINE] introducing
[YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details], centered on the panel with soft
studio lighting and a gentle drop shadow beneath it. Below the product, stack
4 short benefit lines each preceded by a sparkle icon, in [DARK BRAND COLOR]
serif or script type: [BENEFIT 1-4]. Right 50% panel uses a flat neutral
[CONTRAST COLOR like off-white/beige] background — top shows a plain generic
label such as "[PRODUCT CATEGORY] — The Old Way" in muted gray type, with a
single unbranded, generic-looking competitor container (no logo, dull matte
finish) centered under equally flat, shadowless lighting to feel deliberately
uninspired. Below it, stack 4 short drawback lines each preceded by a
thumbs-down icon, in muted gray type: [DRAWBACK 1-4]. Both product renders
sit at the same vertical height and scale for a fair, symmetrical showdown.
No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only. The
composition should feel like an honest, confident side-by-side reveal —
our clean, considered solution versus the outdated, harsh default everyone
has settled for. Add a small disclaimer/footnote at the bottom-left in tiny
gray type if a comparative claim is made: [CLAIM/DISCLAIMER].

templates.name: Split-Screen This-vs-That Comparison
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a vertical split-screen
comparison: the canvas is divided down the center into two vertical halves
with a soft diagonal-free seam. The left half sits on a [SOFT BRAND COLOR
like sage green] solid background and represents "Us" — the top-left holds
an italic serif headline "This Instead of That" in [DARK BRAND COLOR], with
a small pill-shaped badge beneath it in [ACCENT COLOR] stating [SHORT
HEADLINE]. Below that, a vertical checklist of 2-4 short benefit lines, each
preceded by a check-mark icon, listing [BENEFIT 1-4]. The right half sits on
a warm neutral [BACKGROUND] tone and represents "Them" — a matching vertical
list of 2-4 short drawback lines, each preceded by an X icon, listing the
competing pain points this category solves against. Along the bottom third,
[YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] is centered so it straddles the
seam, lit to visually read as "half Us, half Them" — one side of the product
finished and premium, the other side dull or visually degraded — making the
product itself the literal dividing line of the comparison. Studio lighting,
soft and even, shallow shadow beneath the product, high clarity product
photography. The scene should feel like a confident, no-nonsense verdict —
a viewer mid-decision seeing the smarter choice laid out plainly beside the
inferior default they've been settling for. No people, hands, faces, or
body parts — product and props only.

templates.name: Discount Banner + Close-Up Routine Moment
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical 9:16 layout in three
stacked zones. Top 25% is a solid [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] block containing
[YOUR OFFER like Save up to 30%] as a bold oversized headline in white, with
[YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence] beneath it in a lighter weight. A rounded
starburst badge in [ACCENT COLOR] overlaps the top-right corner of the photo
zone below, containing [YOUR OFFER secondary, like + choose a free gift] in
white bold text. Middle 60% is a tightly cropped, soft-lit lifestyle photo
filling the full width edge-to-edge: [AUDIENCE PERSON] shown from mid-chest up,
eyes closed, hands framing their own face in a calm self-care gesture, as if
mid-routine with [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] just applied —
product itself may be off-frame or implied by the gesture rather than shown.
Soft diffuse studio light, shallow depth of field, warm natural skin tones
against a neutral background. Bottom 12% is a solid [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR]
block containing the [BRAND] logo centered, with [CLAIM] in a thin uppercase
tracked font beneath it. The scene should feel like a private, unhurried
moment of self-care mid-routine — quiet confidence, not performance. Cast
[AUDIENCE PERSON] — someone living with [AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY]. Their
closed-eyed expression and relaxed posture should evoke
[AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY], not a model selling a product.

templates.name: UGC Phone-Selfie SMS Offer
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Frame a candid, iPhone-selfie-style
shot of [AUDIENCE PERSON] laughing mid-motion while holding up her phone toward
the lens as if filming herself, phone case visible in a bold branded pattern
using [ACCENT COLOR] and [CONTRAST COLOR]. She fills the left ~55% of frame,
shot close and slightly off-center, candid energy, natural indoor light,
shallow depth of field, background a soft solid [BACKGROUND] wash with no set
dressing. Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON] — someone living with [AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY].
Her expression and posture should evoke [AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY], not a
model selling a product. In the right ~45%, layer two rounded speech-bubble
text panels stacked vertically, top bubble smaller in [SOFT BRAND COLOR like
lavender/light purple] reading "[YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence]", bottom bubble
larger and bolder in [DARK BRAND COLOR] containing "[DISCOUNT like 40%] OFF"
as an oversized stat headline with "[YOUR OFFER like Free Shipping over $50]"
beneath it in smaller weight; bubble tails point toward her phone screen.
Place [BRAND] wordmark bottom-right in [CONTRAST COLOR]. The scene should feel
like a real customer just got a surprise deal pop up on her phone and had to
show someone — spontaneous, delighted, unscripted. No studio product shot, no
posed hand model — this is a lived, joyful reaction moment.

templates.name: Fortune Cookie Testimonial Reveal
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical layout on a clean white
background. Top 25% holds a bold, centered two-line headline in [DARK BRAND
COLOR] sans-serif: [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words]. Center 45% shows a single
fortune cookie, cracked open in two halves, angled slightly toward camera,
resting on the white surface with soft, even studio light and a subtle
natural shadow beneath it. A small paper fortune-slip emerges from the
cookie's break, printed with [PULL-QUOTE — the most emotional 4-8 word
phrase from the review] in dark serif or typewriter-style text, with a few
loose cookie crumbs scattered just below for realism. Below the cookie, one
line of small bold-lead body copy states a claim: [CLAIM] with [STAT] woven
in naturally. Bottom 15% is a full-width, rounded-corner solid [DARK BRAND
COLOR] button with centered white text reading [CTA like Start your free
trial →]. Generous white negative space surrounds every element so the
cookie and slip stay the clear focal point. No people, hands, faces, or body
parts — product and props only. The arrangement should feel like a moment of
quiet, delightful discovery — as if the answer the viewer has been hoping
for just cracked open in front of them, turning a piece of social proof into
a small, fortune-telling reveal rather than a hard sales pitch.

templates.name: Chalkboard Hand-Held Stat List
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Full-bleed dark textured
chalkboard background filling the entire frame. Left 55-60% of the canvas is
a clear text zone in chalk-style handwritten typography: a large 2-line
headline in [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR or off-white chalk tone] at the top, followed
by a short vertical list of 2-3 benefit stats each preceded by a small
hand-drawn emoji or icon (e.g. [STAT 1 like 200 CALORIES], [STAT 2 like 20G
PROTEIN]), then 1-2 short offer/promo lines in the same handwritten style
lower down. A tiny disclaimer line of fine print sits centered near the
bottom edge. Right third of the frame shows a hand entering from the bottom
edge, holding [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] upright at
chest-height, product label facing camera, shot with soft even studio
lighting and shallow depth of field so the product stays crisp against the
textured backdrop. A small hand-drawn icon (like a t-shirt or bonus-item
sketch) with an arrow points toward a short callout label near the product
(e.g. "[SHORT HEADLINE]"). Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON] — someone living with
[AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY]. The hand's grip and posture should feel casual and
confident, like someone reaching for a simple daily fix rather than posing
for an ad, evoking [AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY]. The scene should feel
like a personal chalkboard note-to-self — simple rules jotted down by hand —
with the product picked up mid-reach as the easy, obvious first step toward
the promise on the board.

templates.name: Smiling Endorser — Dual Product Reveal
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical 9:16 frame on a solid
[BACKGROUND] flat-color backdrop. Top 12% holds [BRAND] wordmark centered
above [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words] in bold [DARK BRAND COLOR] text,
center-aligned. Center 65% frames a person from the chest up, facing camera
with a warm, genuine, closed-or-open smile, holding [YOUR PRODUCT with key
packaging details] raised in one hand near her cheek and a second
complementary [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] in the other hand at
chest height, both labels angled toward camera and clearly legible. A small
circular badge reading [TRUST BADGE like "DERMATOLOGIST DEVELOPED"] sits
top-right, overlapping her shoulder line. Bottom 12% holds a rounded pill CTA
button in [ACCENT COLOR] with [CTA like SHOP NOW] in bold dark text, centered
with margin below. Shot at 50mm f/4, bright even soft studio light from the
front, minimal shadow, crisp focus on face and product labels, casual
wardrobe (plain tee), no distracting props. Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON] — someone
living with [AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY]. Her expression and posture should evoke
[AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY], not a model selling a product. The scene
should feel like a real person genuinely excited to show a friend the two
products that turned her routine around — candid enthusiasm, not a staged
endorsement.

templates.name: In-Hand Scoop + Review Proof
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical 9:16 split layout. Top
70% is a solid [BACKGROUND] colored backdrop with [BRAND] and
[PRODUCT CATEGORY] shown as a small centered wordmark near the top. Below it,
a hand enters from the lower-left holding [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging
details] tilted at a slight diagonal, lid removed, with a small amount of the
product's texture visibly scooped or swiped along the container's edge as if
just used — candid, mid-action, not a static studio pose. Bottom 30% is a
solid white panel containing, top to bottom: a bold short headline
[SHORT HEADLINE], an italicized customer quote
[PULL-QUOTE — the most emotional 4-8 word phrase from the review], a row of
[STAR RATING like five gold stars], and an attribution line
[ATTRIBUTION like - Erin D.]. Lighting is soft, even, and bright with no
harsh shadows, giving a clean but informal product-demo feel. Shallow depth
of field on the hand and product, background kept flat and unobtrusive. Cast
[AUDIENCE PERSON] — someone living with [AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY]. Her hand
and gesture should feel natural and unposed, evoking
[AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY], not a model selling a product. The scene
should feel like a real customer's quick, honest capture of the product
working, paired with proof from someone just like her — reassuring rather
than aspirational.

templates.name: Benefit Timeline Product Hero
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. On a soft [BACKGROUND] textured
surface (warm marble-veined or paper-grain texture), center [BRAND] logo at
the very top. Below it, place a bold two-line [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words]
in [DARK BRAND COLOR], stacked and center-aligned. Beneath the headline, build
a vertical dotted connector line running down the middle of the frame with
four circular icon nodes branching alternately left and right, each paired
with a short bold [BENEFIT 1-4] label in [DARK BRAND COLOR] and a simple
line-art icon inside a [SOFT BRAND COLOR like lavender/light purple] circle
matching the accent tone. Interrupt the sequence partway down with a small
rounded speech-bubble card containing a one-line [PULL-QUOTE — the most
emotional 4-8 word phrase from the review] in italics with [ATTRIBUTION like
- Erin D.] and a "(Verified Customer)" tag beneath it in smaller type. Anchor
[YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] large at the bottom-center of the
frame, sitting on or emerging from the textured surface, with a small round
badge callout near its upper-left edge stating a [STAT like 15 MILLION
ADVANCED SIZE]. Even, diffuse studio lighting throughout with soft natural
shadow beneath the product; no dramatic directional light. The overall
arrangement should feel like a simple, trustworthy checklist a friend
handed you — as if the brand is walking a first-time buyer step-by-step
through exactly why this one product covers everything they were juggling
separately, building quiet confidence before they even reach the CTA. No
people, hands, faces, or body parts — product, icons, and props only.

templates.name: Radial Benefit Burst — Product Hero with Icon Callouts
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical 4:5 layout on a soft
[BACKGROUND] gradient with a radiant glow blooming directly behind the
product. Top 20% holds [BRAND] logo centered, then a bold, tightly-tracked
two-line [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words] in [DARK BRAND COLOR], with a
smaller [YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence] beneath it naming the core ingredients
or mechanism. Center-stage, [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] sits
hero-sized on a soft shadow, with 2-3 loose product components (capsules,
drops, or texture swatches appropriate to the product) floating around it as
if caught mid-orbit. Overlap a small circular badge on the upper-left edge of
the product stating [SOCIAL PROOF like a units-sold or trust stat], and a
second circular badge on the lower-right edge stating [TRUST BADGE like
"90-DAY MONEY-BACK GUARANTEE"]. Arrange four benefit callouts in a symmetric
grid flanking the product — one in each corner quadrant — each pairing a
simple line-art icon with a short 2-4 word benefit in [DARK BRAND COLOR],
connected to the product by a thin curved line to imply energy radiating
outward. Reserve the full-width bottom 12-15% as a solid [ACCENT COLOR]
banner containing a bold, centered [YOUR OFFER like Free Shipping over $50]
or [DISCOUNT like 40%] message in [CONTRAST COLOR] type. The scene should
feel like a burst of proof and benefits radiating outward from the product —
confident, energetic, and reassuring, as if the product is the calm center
of everything it delivers. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product
and props only.

templates.name: Confession Hook + Product Reveal (Counter Reach-In)
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Top 55% of frame: a softly lit
[SETTING like a bright modern kitchen] with a marble or light stone countertop,
shot at 50mm f/2.0 for shallow depth of field. A hand enters from the top edge
of frame, fingers wrapped around the lid of [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging
details], caught mid-motion lifting or placing it on the counter. Background is
softly blurred with warm ambient life details (a coffee cup, a small plant) that
suggest a real home, not a studio. A small handwritten-style caption bubble
floats near the upper-right of the product, reading [PULL-QUOTE — the most
emotional 4-8 word phrase from the review]. Bottom 45% of frame is a clean
[BACKGROUND] panel: a bold, punchy [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words] in heavy
black sans-serif type stacked across 2-3 lines, followed by a smaller one-line
[YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence] beneath it. A full-width [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] CTA
bar anchors the bottom edge with [BRAND] logo mark on the left and [CTA like
SHOP NOW] in white uppercase type on the right. Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON] — someone
living with [AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY]. Her hand's gesture and the intimacy of the
counter-top framing should evoke [AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY], not a model
selling a product. The scene should feel like a private, unscripted moment in
her own kitchen — this is the product she quietly reaches for now, not a staged
hero shot. Natural warm daylight, no harsh studio lighting, candid authenticity
over polish.

templates.name: Routine Close-Up + Subscription Offer Panel
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical 9:16 split layout: top 70%
is a close-cropped lifestyle photo of a person applying [YOUR PRODUCT with key
packaging details] directly to their own face/skin with one hand, shot against
a seamless [BACKGROUND] studio backdrop, soft even light, shallow depth of
field, candid confident half-smile expression. A starburst badge sits in the
top-left corner overlapping the photo reading "[YOUR OFFER like + FREE GIFT]".
Bottom 30% is a solid [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] panel: [YOUR PRODUCT with key
packaging details] lineup (2-3 units) floats on the left third, [BRAND] logo
sits upper-right of this panel, with bold stacked offer copy "[DISCOUNT like
SAVE UP TO 30%]" and subhead "[YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence]" filling the right
two-thirds. Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON] — someone living with [AUDIENCE DAILY
REALITY]. Her expression and posture should evoke [AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL
IDENTITY], not a model selling a product. The scene should feel like a quick,
unselfconscious moment inside someone's real daily routine, not a staged
demo — this is just what she does now, and it's working.

templates.name: Lifestyle-to-Offer Split Panel (Quiz/Discount)
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical 9:16 split composition.
Top 60% is a close-up lifestyle photo: [AUDIENCE PERSON] shown mid-routine
with [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] worked into a visible
skin-care/self-care gesture (e.g. lathering, applying, massaging), eyes
softly closed, relaxed and content expression, shot against a plain light
neutral background (soft tile, painted wall, or seamless backdrop) with
even, diffuse studio lighting and shallow depth of field. Small
[BRAND] logo sits top-left over the photo in [DARK BRAND COLOR], with
[YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words] set in bold [DARK BRAND COLOR] type
directly beneath it, left-aligned in the negative space above the subject's
hands. Bottom 40% is a solid [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] panel that breaks sharply
from the photo, containing a large bold [DISCOUNT like 15% OFF] headline in
white flanked by small sparkle/star accent icons in [ACCENT COLOR], with
[YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence] in [ACCENT COLOR] directly below it, and a
tiny fine-print disclaimer line in muted white at the very bottom. The scene
should feel like a genuine, unhurried moment of personal care that
transitions into a confident, energetic invitation to act — intimate first,
then decisive. Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON] — someone living with
[AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY]. Her expression and posture should evoke
[AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY], not a model selling a product. Photograph
at 85mm f/2.2, soft frontal-diffuse light, warm true-to-skin tones, crisp
focus on face and hands with a softly blurred background.

templates.name: SMS Signup Selfie Offer
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Full-bleed lifestyle photo against
a solid [BRAND COLOR like soft teal] backdrop: [AUDIENCE PERSON] holds up her
phone toward the camera as if snapping a selfie or video, mid-laugh, phone
screen angled so [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] can be glimpsed
reflected or held alongside it in her other hand. She fills the left 55% of
the frame, cropped tight from the shoulders up, candid handheld energy, soft
even beauty lighting, shallow depth of field. On the right 45%, two rounded
speech-bubble callouts stack vertically like text messages: the upper smaller
bubble in [SOFT BRAND COLOR like lavender/light purple] reads
"[SHORT HEADLINE]", the lower larger bubble in [DARK BRAND COLOR] reads
"[DISCOUNT like 15% OFF]" in oversized bold type above "[YOUR OFFER like your
next order when you sign up for texts]" in smaller regular type. [BRAND] logo
sits bottom-right in reversed [CONTRAST COLOR]. The scene should feel like a
genuine, excited reaction caught mid-moment — like she just got a notification
worth screen-recording, not a staged studio ad. Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON] —
someone living with [AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY]. Her expression and posture
should evoke [AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY], not a model selling a product.

templates.name: Draped Testimonial Scroll with Flanking Products
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Background is a deep [DARK BRAND COLOR]
solid field, overlaid with large oversized quotation-mark glyphs in a slightly
lighter tint of the same color, placed top-left and bottom-right as subtle
texture. Center canvas: a soft, gently rippled fabric/paper scroll in
[SOFT BRAND COLOR like cream/off-white] draped diagonally corner-to-corner,
its natural folds and shadow creases visible, acting as the text panel. On top
of the scroll, a customer testimonial is set in tight, bold sans-serif type,
mixed weight and size for emphasis: opening line, then one short high-impact
phrase set much larger in [ACCENT COLOR] as a horizontal highlight band with
white/light type, then a closing line, then a small red heart emoji, then the
reviewer's first name in italic below. [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging
details] appears twice, small in scale relative to the canvas: one unit
tucked into the top-right corner tilted diagonally, and a second unit
resting in the bottom-left corner, both partially cropped by the frame edge
so the scroll and quote remain the clear focal point. No people, hands,
faces, or body parts — product and props only. The arrangement should feel
like a screenshotted rave review pinned to a mood board — intimate, credible,
and unscripted, as if a real customer's words were literally wrapped around
the product. Lighting is flat and even, mimicking a social-media graphic
rather than a photographic scene; soft drop shadow under the scroll and jars
for subtle depth.

templates.name: Bold Discount Badge with Hero Product & Skeptic Hook
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a warm gradient
background transitioning from [DARK BRAND COLOR] at the top to
[PRIMARY BRAND COLOR like warm amber/gold] at the bottom, with soft floating
oil-droplet or particle graphics drifting across the frame and small
illustrated botanical/floral ornaments tucked into two opposite corners for
brand texture. Place [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] large and
upright in the lower-left to center, angled slightly, catching a soft
highlight along its edge as the clear hero element grounding the composition.
Position [BRAND] logo small and clean in the top-right corner. In the upper-
right quadrant, set a skeptic-hook headline in quotes: [YOUR HEADLINE, under
10 words] in clean white sans-serif, followed by a short reassurance line
—"Try it for yourself." plus a risk-reversal guarantee: [TRUST BADGE like
"Don't see results? Return it, no questions asked!"]. Below that, stack a
bold two-line CTA statement leading into a giant oversized discount callout:
[DISCOUNT like 15%] OFF in heavy white numerals with soft drop-shadow,
anchored bottom-right so it reads as the dominant visual weight after the
product. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only.
The arrangement should feel like a confident, slightly cheeky challenge to
skeptics — as if the brand is saying "prove us wrong," turning doubt into a
low-risk trial moment rather than a hard sell.

templates.name: Illustrated Border Discount Hero
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Square canvas framed by a
hand-illustrated botanical border (vines and small leaves along the top edge,
a dense band of illustrated flowers matching [KEY INGREDIENT] or brand motif
along the bottom edge). Background is a warm, mottled textured surface in
[BACKGROUND] — soft, weathered, artisanal, not flat or digital-looking. Brand
logo badge sits top-right in a small dark rounded pill. Left 60% of the frame
holds stacked left-aligned copy: a two-line serif [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10
words] in [DARK BRAND COLOR] at the top, followed below by a discount callout
— a small "now at" line, then an oversized [DISCOUNT like 15%] "OFF" in bold
serif, then a [URGENCY PHRASE like Limited Time Offer] in tracked-out
uppercase beneath it. Right 40% shows [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging
details] as a clean hero product shot floating in soft, diffuse warm light
against the same textured background — no surface or props, just the product
lit and centered as if suspended. The scene should feel like a trusted,
long-established staple being made newly accessible through a time-bound
offer — heritage and urgency in the same frame, warm and inviting rather than
aggressive or discount-bin. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product
and props only.

templates.name: Speech-Bubble Review Circle with Peeking Product
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a large cream/off-white
circular speech-bubble shape (with a small pointed tail at bottom-right, like
a chat bubble) centered on the canvas, filling roughly 85% of the frame, set
against a [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] radial-gradient background (dark at edges,
warm glow toward center). Frame the circle with oversized decorative quotation
marks: one large open-quote mark near the top, one large close-quote mark near
the bottom, both in [DARK BRAND COLOR]. Inside the circle, stack text
top-to-bottom, all centered: a small setup line at top, e.g. "[YOUR SUBHEAD,
one sentence]"; below it a bold oversized pull-quote headline spanning 2-3
lines using large/small type-size contrast to emphasize the most emotional
phrase, e.g. "[PULL-QUOTE — the most emotional 4-8 word phrase from the
review]"; below that, smaller body copy continuing the testimonial in 3-4
lines, e.g. "[FULL QUOTE 2-3 sentences]" with one phrase bolded/italicized
for emphasis and a small emoji accent at the end; at the very bottom of the
circle, a single attribution line, e.g. "-[REVIEWER NAME like Dawn K.]".
[YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] breaks the circle's edge at the
top-right corner, tilted diagonally and cropped tight so only part of it is
visible, catching warm rim light; a second, smaller instance of the product
lies horizontally along the bottom-left edge, also cropped, resting in soft
shadow. In the bottom-right corner outside the circle, place a compact
two-line promo callout in [ACCENT COLOR] and [CONTRAST COLOR] text, e.g.
"[URGENCY PHRASE like FINAL HOURS]: [DISCOUNT like 15% OFF]". No people,
hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only. The scene should feel
like a warm, personal note passed between friends — an unscripted, glowing
endorsement that makes the product feel like a trusted daily companion rather
than an advertised item.

templates.name: Hand-Held Testimonial Quote Card
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Square 1:1 split layout: left
45% shows a close-up of a hand holding [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging
details] at chest height, thumb and fingers wrapped around the container,
soft warm directional light from the upper left, shallow depth of field,
candid phone-photo energy rather than a studio shot. Right 55% is a
testimonial card on a [BACKGROUND] panel bordered by a thin [ACCENT COLOR]
frame: a small italic intro line at the top, a bold oversized serif
headline pulled from a review inside a [DARK BRAND COLOR] highlight box
reading [PULL-QUOTE — the most emotional 4-8 word phrase from the review],
followed by [FULL QUOTE 2-3 sentences] in a clean sans-serif with one
phrase bolded for emphasis, then [ATTRIBUTION like - Erin D.] and a small
heart accent. A large decorative quotation-mark glyph anchors the
top-right and bottom-right corners of the text panel. A bold horizontal
banner spans the bottom ~10% of the frame in [DARK BRAND COLOR] with
[URGENCY PHRASE like Limited Offer] in white and [DISCOUNT like 40%] in a
bright [ACCENT COLOR]. The scene should feel like a real customer paused
mid-routine to snap proof of a product she trusts enough to keep a backup
of — intimate, unscripted, and genuinely enthusiastic rather than staged.
Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON like a woman in her late 30s to 50s investing in a
consistent skincare ritual] — someone living with [AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY
like quiet skepticism toward skincare hype after trying products that
overpromised]. Her hand's grip and the framing should evoke [AUDIENCE
ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY like someone who has finally found a ritual worth
being loyal to], not a model selling a product.

templates.name: Back-in-Stock Testimonial Glow
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Split composition on a warm
[BRAND COLOR like golden amber] gradient background. Left 40% shows
[YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] standing upright on a dark
reflective surface, softly lit from above with a warm glow that rim-lights
the container edge and casts a subtle mirrored reflection below it; shallow
depth of field, background fading into soft warm blur. Right 60% is a clear
text zone stacked top to bottom: a small dark rectangular badge reading
[URGENCY PHRASE like BACK IN STOCK] in bold caps, a row of [STAR RATING like
five gold stars] beneath it, then a short review lead-in line, followed by a
larger bold pull-quote styled 20-30% bigger than surrounding body text —
[PULL-QUOTE — the most emotional 4-8 word phrase from the review] — with one
closing line of regular-weight review copy underneath, and the reviewer
attribution [REVIEWER NAME like Jasmine A.] with [LOCATION like United
States] in smaller gray text below the quote. Bottom-right corner holds a
circular or angled discount callout showing [DISCOUNT like 15%] and "OFF" in
bold contrasting type. The scene should feel like a beloved product has just
returned from being sold out — the warm light and glowing surface signal
relief and renewed desire, while the oversized testimonial line functions as
the emotional anchor a scrolling shopper stops on. No people, hands, faces,
or body parts — product and props only.

templates.name: Curated Bundle Offer — Product Garden Pedestal Grid
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Build a square promo layout in
three horizontal bands. Top band (left 60%): solid [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR]
block containing a bold offer headline "[YOUR OFFER like Any Duo for $90]"
in oversized white/[CONTRAST COLOR] type, with a smaller accent-color line
below it stating a bonus incentive like "[YOUR OFFER like + Guaranteed Free
Gift]". Top band (right 40%): white panel with a short audience-targeted
headline "[SHORT HEADLINE like Women 40+ love these]" in bold dark serif
type, plus a small circular [BRAND] logo mark top-right. Middle thin band:
full-width white strip with a single centered instruction line "[YOUR
SUBHEAD, one sentence]" in bold black text. Main band (bottom ~55% of
frame): a lush, editorial hero shot — multiple units of [YOUR PRODUCT with
key packaging details] arranged at varied heights on raised stone/rock
pedestals, staged outdoors amid soft-focus green foliage with warm natural
daylight from the upper left, shallow depth of field, shot at roughly 50mm
f/2.8. Products should read as a "curated collection" — vary container
sizes and finishes across the grouping while keeping [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR]
and [ACCENT COLOR] consistent across labels. No people, hands, faces, or
body parts — product and props only. A dark banner strip near the bottom
overlays "[URGENCY PHRASE like Limited-Time Offer]" in bold white
centered text, with small "[DISCLAIMER like Terms Apply]" text in the
bottom-right corner. The arrangement should feel like a premium botanical
apothecary display — abundant, curated, and worth lingering over, inviting
the viewer to browse and pick favorites rather than grab-and-go.

templates.name: "Ordered By Accident" Unboxed Review Card
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Full-bleed background is a
dark, richly textured [SURFACE like polished dark marble] lit with warm
directional light from the upper right, creating soft dramatic shadows.
Top third of the frame holds a large bold headline reading
[YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words] with the emphasized final word set in an
italic serif contrast typeface in [ACCENT COLOR]. Below it, on the left
third, a short kicker line stacks 2-3 words in bold caps followed by an
italicized supporting phrase, e.g. [SHORT HEADLINE] styled as a callout.
Center-right of the frame, an open cardboard shipping box sits at a
slight diagonal angle, flaps open, with [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging
details] emerging from inside, partially visible. Taped to the inside of
the box flap is a small white paper card bearing a five-star rating row
in [ACCENT COLOR like gold/orange], a handwritten-feel or typewritten
review excerpt of [FULL QUOTE 2-3 sentences], with the single most
emotional phrase highlighted in a bright yellow marker-style highlight
box, followed by [ATTRIBUTION like - Erin D.] and [VERIFIED BADGE TEXT
like Verified Reviewer] in small caps beneath. Shot at 50mm f/4, tight
product-and-paper macro framing, shallow depth of field with the box
interior sharp and the marble background softly falling off. No people,
hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only. The scene should
feel like an authentic unboxing moment caught mid-surprise — as if a
real customer just opened their delivery and taped their own five-star
verdict inside the box before they could even close it, making the
product feel proven, trusted, and worth repeat-ordering.

templates.name: Golden-Hour Close-Up Testimonial
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Frame an extreme close-up macro
portrait filling the top 65% of the canvas: [AUDIENCE PERSON]'s face shot
tight from mid-forehead to chin, eyes gently closed, a soft, private,
contented smile, skin lit by warm golden-hour side light with a shallow depth
of field that softly blurs the background. The bottom 35% blends from the
warm skin tones into a [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] gradient overlay that anchors a
testimonial text block: a small opening quotation mark, a short italic
pre-headline "[SHORT HEADLINE]" in bold white, a large bold two-line
headline "[PULL-QUOTE — the most emotional 4-8 word phrase from the review]"
in white, and a smaller attribution line "- [REVIEWER NAME like Stephanie G.]"
beneath it. Include a small disclaimer in the bottom corner:
"[VERIFIED BADGE TEXT like Representative image; not the reviewer]". The
scene should feel like a genuine, unguarded moment of quiet relief — as if
this real customer has just noticed her reflection and, for the first time
in a while, likes what she sees. Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON] — someone living
with [AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY]. Her expression and posture should evoke
[AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY], not a model selling a product. No visible
product or packaging in frame — this is a face-and-testimony format, not a
product shot.

templates.name: Glow Reveal Portrait — Arched Claim Headline
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Full-bleed close-up beauty
portrait on a vivid [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR]-to-[ACCENT COLOR] gradient
background, with a soft warm glow flare entering from the lower-left corner.
[AUDIENCE PERSON] fills the frame from mid-chest up, head tilted slightly,
looking directly at camera with a calm, confident half-smile; skin rendered
luminous and dewy with a natural glow retouch. She holds [YOUR PRODUCT with
key packaging details] raised near her jawline in one hand, label facing
camera. Top-left: [SHORT HEADLINE, under 8 words] in bold [ACCENT COLOR]
type; directly below in white, [YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence]. A large arched
line of type reading [CLAIM, one striking word or short phrase] curves like
a rainbow across the upper-middle of the frame, overlapping her hair and the
top of the product, with a small sparkle/glint accent beside it. Shot at
85mm f/1.8, soft diffuse beauty light with warm rim light from the left,
shallow depth of field, hair softly loose and backlit. Cast [AUDIENCE
PERSON] — someone living with [AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY]. Her expression and
posture should evoke [AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY], not a model selling a
product. The scene should feel like a private moment of self-discovery —
the beat right after she notices her own reflection looks unexpectedly
radiant, expensive, and effortless, with no makeup involved.

templates.name: Cult-Classic Restock Urgency Letter
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Design a text-led promotional
static ad on a solid [BACKGROUND] colored background, no scene or props —
just flat color. Top 65% of the canvas is a dense stacked-copy zone in
[DARK BRAND COLOR] and [ACCENT COLOR]: a large serif or bold display
headline at the very top (an apologetic "you're about to miss this" style
opener), followed by an italic urgency subhead, then 2-3 short paragraphs
of mixed bold/regular body copy building scarcity around [PRODUCT
CATEGORY], naming [CLAIM] and [KEY INGREDIENT] benefits, closing with a
bolded urgency line pushing the reader to act before [YOUR PRODUCT with
key packaging details] sells out again. A short italic P.S. line sits
near the bottom-left, teasing a nicknamed benefit or hack tied to the
product. Bottom-right quarter of the frame shows [YOUR PRODUCT with key
packaging details] resting at a diagonal tilt, catching soft studio
light, with a small pool or drip of its contents rendered beneath it on
the background to suggest richness and potency. No CTA button — copy
alone carries the urgency. The scene should feel like a hurried, almost
apologetic personal note warning the reader they're about to miss out on
a fan-favorite that keeps selling out — urgent, intimate, slightly
breathless, like insider information shared just in time. No people,
hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only.

templates.name: Testimonial Quote + Floating Product Hero
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Split composition on a warm
[BACKGROUND] gradient surface with soft floating water-droplet accents
scattered across the frame for a fresh, dewy feel. Left 60% is negative
space reserved for a large bold pull-quote in [DARK BRAND COLOR], set in a
confident serif or rounded sans, reading like a genuine customer exclamation
— [PULL-QUOTE — the most emotional 4-8 word phrase from the review].
Below the quote, place a small green verified checkmark icon beside
[REVIEWER NAME like Liz G.], Age [AGE], in a smaller weight of the same
color to signal authenticity. Right 35-40% shows [YOUR PRODUCT with key
packaging details] standing upright, lit with soft diffuse overhead light,
label facing forward and fully legible, resting as if suspended mid-frame
among the droplets — no surface visible beneath it. Bottom-right corner
carries a small italic disclaimer: [DISCLAIMER TEXT like "Individual results
may vary"]. The scene should feel like a real, unscripted customer moment
captured mid-thought — a genuine reaction shared in the excitement of
noticing visible change, warm and believable rather than staged. No people,
hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only.

templates.name: Texture-Proof Finger Stretch Demo
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Frame a tight macro close-up of
two fingers pulling apart a thin, glossy strand of [YOUR PRODUCT with key
packaging details] to prove its texture and melt-into-skin consistency, shot
against a smooth [BACKGROUND] gradient (deep tone at the edges, softly
lightening toward center) that reads premium and clinical. Top-left to
top-full-width zone (roughly top 45% of frame) holds stacked white headline
typography in three weights: a light lead-in line, a bold oversized quoted
phrase naming the sensory hook, and a medium-weight follow-up line stating
the benefit — all left-aligned, high-contrast against the dark background.
Bottom 55% of frame is the demo: fingers enter from the bottom-right corner,
product stretches diagonally between them, catching soft directional light
so the strand appears semi-translucent and glistening. Cast [AUDIENCE
PERSON] — someone living with [AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY]. The hand's posture
should feel curious and hands-on, evoking [AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY],
not a staged model gesture. Shot at macro focal length, shallow depth of
field, skin and product in sharp focus, background falling into soft blur.
Scene should feel like a satisfying, slightly surprising proof-of-texture
moment — the kind of visual that makes someone stop scrolling to understand
what they're looking at before they've even read the words.

templates.name: Bundle Offer — Curated Stone & Moss Product Cluster
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Soft [BACKGROUND] fills the full
canvas as a flat, airy backdrop. Top-left to center-left 55% of the frame is a
clear text zone on the plain background: a two-line stacked headline reading
"[SHORT HEADLINE]" in bold [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] serif for the first word and
italic [ACCENT COLOR] script for the second word, with a short supporting line
in dark serif beside it. Below that, a large stacked offer callout in bold
[PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] displaying "[YOUR OFFER like 7 for $139]" at oversized
scale, with 2-3 lines of supporting bullet-style copy in [ACCENT COLOR] and
dark charcoal listing what's included (e.g. "[BENEFIT 1-4]"). Bottom-right
corner holds small fine-print text "[CLAIM]" or terms language. Right 45% of
the frame, biased toward center-bottom, shows a tightly staged cluster of
3-4 [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] items of varying heights and
container shapes, arranged standing and slightly overlapping on and around
smooth pale river stones with a scatter of natural moss at the base. Soft,
even, diffuse studio light from the front-left, minimal shadow, shallow
depth of field keeping the front product crisp and the rear products softly
in focus. Delicate hand-drawn botanical vine line-art in [DARK BRAND COLOR]
traces the top-right and bottom-left corners as a decorative frame element.
The arrangement should feel like a curated apothecary shelf — natural,
considered, and premium — inviting the viewer to feel like they're
hand-picking their own personalized ritual rather than accepting a
one-size-fits-all deal. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and
props only.

templates.name: Product-to-Skin Proof Shot — Intimate Body-Part Close-Up
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Extreme close-up beauty
photography, cropped tight on [AUDIENCE PERSON]'s [BODY AREA like neck and
jawline] in three-quarter profile, filling the left 55% of frame; warm,
soft backlit rim light from behind creates a glowing highlight along the
skin's edge, shallow depth of field, creamy blurred background in
[SOFT BRAND COLOR like warm neutral cream]. In the lower-right quadrant her
fingers hold [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] angled diagonally
so it rests directly against the treated area, as if caught mid-gesture of
applying or admiring the result. Left-middle text zone, left-aligned,
stacked vertically: small kicker line "The [CLAIM]," then a large bold
serif/sans headline broken into short stacked words — [BENEFIT 1],
[BENEFIT 2], [BENEFIT 3] — in [CONTRAST COLOR], followed by a smaller
italic reveal line like "[SHORT HEADLINE]" positioned lower-right near the
product. The product's [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] body and [ACCENT COLOR] cap
should read as the only cool, saturated note against the warm skin tones,
making it visually pop without a busy background. The scene should feel
like a private, unguarded moment where she has just discovered a visible
change in the mirror and is holding the product against the very spot it
transformed — intimate, confident, and quietly triumphant, not staged like
a studio ad. Cast [AUDIENCE PERSON] — someone living with
[AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY]. Her expression and posture should evoke
[AUDIENCE ASPIRATIONAL IDENTITY], not a model selling a product. No visible
logos, price tags, or CTA button — copy-only, benefit-led hero composition.

templates.name: Verified Review Quote + Floating Product
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a 4:5 static ad on a
warm, softly textured [BACKGROUND] surface with subtle organic elements
(fine curling threads, soft translucent bubbles) drifting across the frame
for gentle visual movement. Left 65% of the canvas is a clear text zone:
set a large, bold [FULL QUOTE 2-3 sentences] in a confident serif/sans
mix, with the single most emotional phrase — [PULL-QUOTE — the most
emotional 4-8 word phrase from the review] — bolded and slightly larger
than the surrounding quote text, all in [DARK BRAND COLOR] for contrast
against the light background. Below the quote, place a small green
verified checkmark badge beside [REVIEWER NAME like Dawn K.] in a lighter
weight. Right 35% of the canvas shows [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging
details] standing upright and centered vertically, floating slightly
above the surface as the visual anchor, lit with soft diffuse light from
the upper left to create gentle highlights and a soft shadow beneath it.
Add a small disclaimer line in the bottom right corner: "*Individual
results may vary." The scene should feel like a genuine, unscripted
customer confession caught mid-sentence — the kind of praise so specific
and urgent it reads as real, not scripted, giving the product an
instant, trusted third-party endorsement. No people, hands, faces, or
body parts — product and props only.

templates.name: Skin Concern Macro Close-Up + Bold Editorial Callout
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Fill the entire top 55% of the
frame with an extreme macro close-up of [AUDIENCE TRIGGER DETAIL like the
crepey, loose skin on the underside of an upper arm] — shot tight and
unretouched so real skin texture, folds, and fine lines are clearly visible,
soft even lighting, shallow depth of field, no product or hands in this zone.
Centered at the midpoint, place a small decorative botanical illustration
motif in [ACCENT COLOR] and [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] echoing [KEY INGREDIENT] as
a visual anchor between the image and the copy below. Below it, stack
centered bold editorial typography: a slim [ACCENT COLOR] eyebrow line
reading [SHORT HEADLINE, under 8 words, framed as "the real reason why"],
then a large heavy [DARK BRAND COLOR] headline in 2-3 lines calling out the
specific skin/body concern in ALL CAPS, then a smaller [ACCENT COLOR] or
[DARK BRAND COLOR] subhead sentence stating the promised outcome. Background
of the lower text zone is a clean neutral [BACKGROUND] with generous negative
space so the copy block reads instantly, like a scroll-stopping editorial
headline rather than a traditional product ad. The scene should feel like a
diagnostic, almost clinical reveal — the viewer recognizing this exact
texture on their own body before any product is shown, creating an "oh,
that's me" moment of quiet self-recognition rather than aspiration. Cast the
skin/body detail to resonate with [AUDIENCE PERSON like a woman in her late
40s who has started avoiding sleeveless clothing]: someone living with
[AUDIENCE DAILY REALITY like noticing new looseness in her skin every time
she gets dressed]. No faces, hands gesturing, or full-body figures — only the
zoomed skin/body area itself as the visual subject.

templates.name: Clinical Stat Callout with Ingredient Bed
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Compose a 4:5 studio ad on a soft
[BACKGROUND] textured surface with a subtle marbled or painterly gradient.
Left 60% of the frame is negative space reserved for two large stacked stat
callouts: a bold oversized [STAT 1 like 91%] in [ACCENT COLOR] followed by a
sentence-style claim with 2-3 key words highlighted in [ACCENT COLOR] (e.g.
"observed a visible reduction in [BENEFIT 1]"), then a second stat block
below it in the same style with [STAT 2 like 86%] and a related claim. Beneath
both, include a small italic disclaimer line in [DARK BRAND COLOR] citing
[CLAIM SOURCE like "a self-assessment study on 120 participants over 8
weeks"]. Right 40% of the frame shows [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging
details] standing upright, catching soft diffuse light from the upper left,
shot at 85mm f/4 with shallow depth of field so the background stays creamy
and out of focus. The bottom edge of the frame is crossed by a dense, tightly
packed bed of [KEY INGREDIENT] spilling across the full width, grounding the
product visually and telling an ingredient-sourced story. No people, hands,
faces, or body parts — product and props only. The arrangement should feel
like a clinical, trustworthy proof-point moment — credible and data-backed
rather than emotional, reassuring a skeptical reader that the results are
real and measurable.

templates.name: Solid-Backdrop Routine Lineup with Bold Headline
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Square 1:1 canvas on a solid
[BACKGROUND] backdrop. Top 45% is a clear negative-space text zone: a bold,
multi-line [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words] set in large dark [DARK BRAND
COLOR] sans-serif type, left-aligned, stacked across 2-3 lines. Below the
headline, a rounded pill-shaped [CTA like Start a routine] button in
[ACCENT COLOR] with white text and a soft drop shadow. Bottom 45% of the
frame shows [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] arranged as a lineup
of 2-3 items in ascending or matched height, standing upright on a raised
[SURFACE like a clean white ledge] that cuts horizontally across the lower
third of the frame, product labels numbered or ordered to suggest a step-
by-step routine. Small sprigs of fresh flowers and greenery rest naturally
at the base of the products on the left side, softening the clinical product
shot with an organic, natural-ingredient accent. [BRAND] logo sits bottom
right in [DARK BRAND COLOR]. Even, soft studio lighting, crisp product
focus, clean commercial look. No people, hands, faces, or body parts —
product and props only. The scene should feel like a simple, approachable
step-by-step ritual laid out and ready to start — reassuring, uncomplicated,
and achievable, like flipping to page one of a routine that finally makes
sense.

templates.name: Generational Testimonial — Quote Card with Product Lineup
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Full-bleed solid [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR]
background. Top 15% holds a bold two-line headline, [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words],
centered, in [DARK BRAND COLOR] on the solid background. Center 45% is a large
rounded-rectangle card in [BACKGROUND] (soft off-white), containing [STAR RATING
like five gold stars] at the top, a large italicized [FULL QUOTE 2-3 sentences]
below it, then [REVIEWER NAME like Laura N.] in bold and [ATTRIBUTION like
ProductMD Mom] in a lighter weight beneath the quote — quote card sits with soft
drop shadow so it visually floats above the background. Lower-right of the card,
overlapping its bottom edge, group [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] as a
lineup of 2-3 companion products of varying heights standing upright, evenly
spaced, front labels fully visible, styled as clean studio product renders with
soft even lighting and no harsh shadows. Bottom 10% of canvas is
reserved for [BRAND] logo, centered, in white or [CONTRAST COLOR], sitting
directly on the solid background beneath the card. No people, hands, faces, or
body parts — product and props only. The arrangement should feel like a trusted
routine being passed down — a real customer's own words vouching for the product
as something worth handing to someone you love, not a staged ad claim.

templates.name: Solid-Color Hero Ledge — 3-Step Routine Lineup
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Fill the full canvas with a
solid [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] background — no gradient, no texture. Top-left
corner holds the [BRAND] logo in white/[CONTRAST COLOR]. Upper-center-left
zone (roughly the top 55% of the frame) is a clear text zone: a bold
two-line headline in [DARK BRAND COLOR], phrased as a question followed by
a short declarative statement — [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words]. Directly
below the headline, place a rounded pill-shaped CTA button in white with a
small gradient accent icon on its left edge, containing the text [CTA like
Start a routine]. The bottom 30-35% of the frame is a flat, slightly
elevated white ledge/surface spanning the full width, as if seen from a
slightly low angle. Standing upright on this ledge, bottom-right, are three
of [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] arranged in ascending step
order (numbered 1, 2, 3 on their labels) to suggest a sequential routine —
tallest/last step slightly behind and to the right. Small sprigs of soft
yellow/white wildflowers and green foliage peek up from behind the ledge on
the bottom-left, breaking the geometry with an organic, natural accent. No
people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only. The scene
should feel like a simple, approachable regimen laid out in clear, ordered
steps — clinical enough to feel effective, warm enough to feel doable, like
the answer to a problem the viewer has been quietly putting off solving.
Flat graphic-design lighting, no dramatic shadows, crisp product edges,
clean vector-adjacent studio render style.

templates.name: Step-System Ledge — Bold Headline Over Botanical Regimen
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical 9:16 canvas split into
two zones. Top 55% is a solid [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] background serving as a
clear text zone: [BRAND] logo top-left, then a bold, high-contrast
[DARK BRAND COLOR] headline (3 short lines, under 12 words) addressing the
core pain point, left-aligned beneath the logo. Below the headline, a
rounded pill-shaped [CTA like Start a routine] button in [CONTRAST COLOR]
with [DARK BRAND COLOR] text, left-aligned. Bottom 45% is a curved,
light neutral surface (like a pale shelf or ledge) rising from the bottom
edge, on which [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] stands as a
numbered step system — multiple units of varying height arranged in a
tidy row, each labeled with a step number and short function name (e.g.
"1", "2", "3"). Tuck loose botanical sprigs matching [KEY INGREDIENT]
(a leaf, a small flower cluster, a colored bloom) behind and between the
units so they peek out asymmetrically, signaling natural ingredients
without cluttering the product labels. Lighting is flat, even, and
commercial-clean — no dramatic shadows, no environmental background,
just a graphic color field and a simple surface. The arrangement should
feel like a simple, trustworthy 3-step ritual laid out and ready to
start today — approachable, orderly, and confidence-building rather than
clinical. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only.

templates.name: Molten Drip Hero — Bold Claim Over Melting Splash
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical layout on a
[BACKGROUND] gradient background transitioning from deep to soft tone of
[PRIMARY BRAND COLOR]. Top third: [BRAND] logo centered at the very top,
below it a bold, oversized [YOUR HEADLINE, under 10 words] in white
uppercase sans-serif spanning near-full width, then a smaller one-line
[YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence] in dark text beneath it. Center-bottom two
thirds: [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging details] stands upright on a
reflective glossy surface, surrounded by a thick, glossy, melting liquid
splash in [ACCENT COLOR] pooling and dripping outward like syrup, with a
single hero [KEY INGREDIENT] prop resting in the puddle beside it and one
loose capsule or unit nearby. The liquid puddle mirrors the product with a
soft reflection. Bottom band: a thin horizontal strip listing
[BENEFIT 1-4] separated by vertical bars in bold uppercase small type on a
[CONTRAST COLOR] background, followed immediately below by a pill-shaped
[CTA like SHOP NOW] button in [CONTRAST COLOR] with contrasting bold text.
Lighting is bright, even, soft studio light with subtle glossy highlights
on the liquid and packaging; the mood is playful, high-energy, and
appetite-triggering. The scene should feel like a decadent, almost
dessert-like transformation moment — the product looks indulgent and fun
rather than clinical, inviting the viewer to want it the way they'd want a
treat. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only.

templates.name: Melting Activation Hero Shot
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical 9:16 story-format ad on
a smooth [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] to [ACCENT COLOR] gradient background, warm at
the top fading into a deeper tone at the bottom. Top-center: [BRAND] logo.
Upper third: bold, oversized white sans-serif headline [YOUR HEADLINE, under
10 words] stacked on two lines with tight leading. Center stage: [YOUR PRODUCT
with key packaging details] resting on top of a glossy, melting pool of a
complementary-colored liquid the same hue family as the product's branding —
pair it with a single oversized hero ingredient or symbolic prop (e.g. a piece
of fruit, ice, or a raw ingredient tied to [KEY INGREDIENT]) shown mid-melt or
mid-transformation beside the product, with a loose capsule or product unit
lying in the foreground puddle. A small rounded badge sits just above/right of
the product displaying [SOCIAL PROOF] or [STAT]. Lit with bright, glossy,
high-key studio lighting so the liquid pool looks wet and reflective; shallow
depth of field keeps the product and prop in crisp focus against the soft
gradient. Below the product: [YOUR SUBHEAD, one sentence] in clean white text,
centered. Bottom of frame: a full-width solid [CONTRAST COLOR] bar containing
[TRUST BADGE like "100% MONEY BACK / 90 DAYS"] in bold centered text. The
scene should feel like something dormant is being switched on — a frozen,
inactive state visibly melting into motion and energy, using the prop's
transformation as a visual metaphor for the product's effect. No people,
hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only.

templates.name: Ingredient-Collision Hero Shot
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical 9:16 canvas on a bold
[PRIMARY BRAND COLOR]-to-[ACCENT COLOR] gradient background. Top 15%: [BRAND]
logo centered in white or contrast lettering. Upper-middle 25%: [YOUR HEADLINE,
under 10 words] in oversized bold black sans-serif type, left-aligned, stacked
across two lines. Center 35% of frame: [YOUR PRODUCT with key packaging
details] rendered as a dramatic hyperreal studio hero shot, intersecting or
paired with [KEY INGREDIENT] shown mid-cut or mid-splash with glossy juice/
liquid droplets pooling beneath it, softly glowing rim light separating product
from background. A small circular badge reading [TRUST BADGE like "15 MILL+
SERVINGS SOLD"] overlaps the lower-left edge of the product visual. Bottom 15%:
[PRODUCT CATEGORY] name in a clean serif or sans-serif line, centered, above a
pill-shaped [CTA like SHOP NOW] button in white with dark text, centered. No
people, hands, faces, or body parts — product and props only. The scene should
feel like an ingredient and product are collapsing into one visual so the
viewer instantly reads "natural trigger meets fast-acting formula" — punchy,
appetite-driven, and confident rather than clinical.

templates.name: Holiday Sale Starburst Promo
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Create a full-bleed promotional
graphic on a solid [PRIMARY BRAND COLOR] background with a soft radial glow
lightening the center behind the headline. Place the [BRAND] logo centered
near the top, sized to occupy roughly 15% of canvas height. Below it, render
a large stacked headline in [ACCENT COLOR] — [URGENCY PHRASE like HOLIDAY SALE]
— spanning the horizontal center, with the largest word scaled dramatically
bigger than the rest for visual punch. In the lower-left third, place a
jagged starburst/sticker badge in [DARK BRAND COLOR] containing
[DISCOUNT like 25% OFF] in bold white or [CONTRAST COLOR] type. To the right
of the starburst, stack supporting offer text — [YOUR OFFER like orders $40+],
"use code:", and [PROMO CODE] — in [ACCENT COLOR] and a deep contrasting blue
or brand-dark tone. Scatter small star or confetti motifs in varying opacities
of [ACCENT COLOR] and [SOFT BRAND COLOR like lavender/light purple] across the
background for festive texture, denser near the edges and corners. Add small
fine-print disclaimer text in muted [DARK BRAND COLOR] centered near the
bottom edge. No people, hands, faces, or body parts — graphic elements,
typography, and brand logo only. The composition should feel like a
celebratory, high-energy retail sale announcement built for a seasonal or
holiday promotional push — bold, urgent, and impossible to scroll past, while
staying clean and legible at a glance. Bold, flat, poster-style graphic design
with crisp vector edges, no photographic elements or textures.

templates.name: Benefit-Radiate Hand-Held Product Diagram
templates.template:
Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact product colors,
typography style, and brand tone precisely. Vertical 3:4 canvas on a soft
[BACKGROUND] gradient (blush-to-cream tone). Bold all-caps [SHORT HEADLINE]
spans the top 15% of the frame in [DARK BRAND COLOR]. Centered in the middle
60%, a hand enters from the bottom edge holding [YOUR PRODUCT with key
